There are different timeframes for when a death must be registered, depending on the jurisdiction where the deceased person lived. Refer to the relevant jurisdiction's official website for further information on the process for registering a death with your local registry office.
Once you register the death, the relevant registry office will issue you with a death certificate which you'll need to handle all the deceased person's affairs, e.g. their Revolut account.

## Get in touch with Revolut
You can contact us by sending us an e-mail to bereavement@revolut.com.
We only communicate about bereavement cases via email. If you're a Revolut customer, you can reach out to Revolut Support via the in-app chat for assistance, but we'll manage the account closure process for the deceased person's account with you via email.
Sometimes, the information we require from you may differ depending on the jurisdiction where the deceased person lived. We'll let you know if this is the case. Otherwise, you'll find the initial information we'll need below.

## Personal information to provide via email to Revolut
- Deceased person's full legal name
- Deceased person's date of birth
- Deceased person's phone number and email address linked to their Revolut account
- Your full legal name
- Your email address
- Your relationship to the deceased person

## Key documents to provide via email to Revolut
- Your ID / passport: high-quality photo or scan of the original document with all four corners of the document visible
- Grant of Probate, Letters of Administration, or official document stating the heir or rightful person to deal with the assets: can be provided by the District Probate Registry
- Death certificate: this will be issued by the registrar. Depending on where the deceased lived, we may be able to accept interim death certificates, coroner's certificates, or authorised translations of overseas death certificates. We'll confirm this when we respond to you
- Indemnity form: can be downloaded using this linkhttps://cdn.revolut.com/forms/Indemnity/Revolut_EN__Bereavement_Form.pdf, or the bereavement form – signed by the rightful heir
- Power of Attorney: for example, if the solicitor is claiming the assets in the name of an heir
- Birth and/or marriage certificate: we may need these to fully and properly identify the claimant

## Once we receive the information we need, Revolut will:
- Cancel all scheduled outbound payments
- Cancel all paid services the deceased person had with us
- Terminate all Revolut cards
- Stop all marketing and communications
- Inform you of everything we need to settle the estate, including the transfer of any remaining balance to the inheritor(s) or solicitor
Prior to transferring the remaining balance and account closure, any stocks, precious metals, or cryptocurrency that the deceased had bought will be liquidated and the equivalent value in fiat will be credited to the main balance of the deceased's account.
We should be in touch with you within 15 days. Depending on the complexity of the case and any ongoing court proceedings, the process to withdraw any remaining balance to the inheritor/s or solicitor's account/s if relevant and fully close the deceased's account may take from a few days to a year.

title: Which Revolut companies provide me with services?
content_text:
The Revolut entity that provides you with our services depends on where you’re located. Each company listed below acts as a data controller of your personal data.
When you receive Revolut services and products through a branch of a Revolut company, only the company itself is considered a data controller of your personal data. This is because the company itself determines the purposes and means of the processing of such data.
For more information on how we handle your data and how to request the exercise of your rights, refer to our Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/privacy-policy/.

## If you're a customer in the UK
- Services provided by Revolut Ltd: e-money account, plans (Plus, Premium, Metal, Ultra), promotions (e.g. product trial), Revolut – Kids & Teens, Lounges, Savings, Crypto, Commodities, Stays, RevPoints, Revolut Pro, Rewards, and Revolut On-Demand Pay
- All insurance products are arranged by Revolut Ltd (an appointed representative of Revolut Travel Ltd). Travel policies are underwritten by Chubb, while purchase, refund, and cancellation cover is provided by Qover SA. Pet Insurance is provided by Great Lakes Insurance SE.
- Investment services are provided by Revolut Trading Ltd

title: How can I improve my financial health?
content_text:
Sometimes circumstances change and worrying about money can become a big problem. It's tough to acknowledge that you might need help with your finances, but we're here to support you.
Check your financial health, and get tips on how to improve money management, with this 60-second debt testhttps://www.stepchange.org/debt-test.aspx by StepChange. While you're there, check out these practical tipshttps://www.stepchange.org/how-we-help/money-advice.aspx on how to reduce your spending and increase your income.

title: How can I share sensitive information with Revolut?
content_text:
At Revolut, we understand how certain circumstances in life can impact your finances and the way you interact with us. When we face difficult situations, we can feel vulnerable — emotionally, mentally, or physically.
We want to give you the right kind of financial support, no matter what. By sharing your circumstances with us through the Tell us somethinghttps://revolut.onelink.me/E528/?af_channel=website_organic&af_dp=revolut%3A%2F%2Fapp%2Fform%2F13e7ebea-1153-42ce-9f4f-390c30eb1814&af_force_deeplink=true&af_sub1=%257B%2522conversion_page_url%2522%253A%2522https%253A%252F%252Fhelp.revolut.com%252Fhelp%252Fmore%252Fhow-can-i-disclose-that-there-is-something-affecting-my-finances-or-my-interaction-with%252F%2522%252C%2522cookie_consent%2522%253A%255B%2522ads%2522%252C%2522analytics%2522%255D%252C%2522landing_page_url%2522%253A%2522https%253A%252F%252Fhelp.revolut.com%252Fhelp%252Fprofile-and-plan%252Fsecurity-and-personal-data%252Fgambling-block%252Fwhat-is-gambling-block%252F%2522%252C%2522qr_code%2522%253Afalse%257D&af_web_dp=https%3A%2F%2Fapp.revolut.com%2Fform%2F13e7ebea-1153-42ce-9f4f-390c30eb1814&pid=website form, we can understand you and your needs better. Filling out the form isn't mandatory, and anything you share with us is strictly confidential.

## What is vulnerability?
Examples of vulnerable circumstances include, but aren't limited to:
- Addiction (e.g. alcoholism, gambling)
- Disability (e.g. injury, visual impairment)
- Financial difficulty
- Grief
- Mental health challenges

## I've already filled out the form
If you filled out the form, here are some points to consider:
If you need to update your circumstances, we recommend completing the form again. If you feel the information you’ve shared with us isn't relevant or no longer impacts your finances or interactions with Revolut, you can let us know via this form. We'll take care of removing the information.

title: Support if you are experiencing financial difficulties
content_text:
Here's a list of charities, organisations, and support groups which offer expert advice on financial difficulties.
- StepChangehttps://www.stepchange.org/ (0800 138 1111)
- Citizens Advice https://www.citizensadvice.org.uk/(0800 144 8848)
- National Debtline https://nationaldebtline.org(0808 808 4000)
- The Money Advice Servicehttps://www.moneyhelper.org.uk/en?source=mas (0800 138 7777)
- PayPlanhttps://www.payplan.com/ (0800 280 2816)

title: What gambling support is available?
content_text:
Find out how safe your gambling is through this quick test by GamCare. If you're worried that you spend more than you should on gambling, here's a list of charities, organisations, and support groups where you can find out more information and receive professional support in the UK:
- GamCare: leading national provider of free information, advice and support for anyone affected by problem gambling. Callall 0808 8020 133
- The Gordon Moody Association: residential courses for men and women who have problems with gambling. Call 01384 241292
- Gamblers Anonymous UK:local support groups that use the 12-step approach to recovery from addiction and offer free meetings for gamblers. Call 0330 094 0322
- Gambling Therapy: online and email peer groups for text-based 'real-time' group support run by trained and knowledgeable facilitators

## Resources outside the UK
- France: visit the Adictel website https://www.adictel.com/or contact Adictel Prevention Addiction 24/7 at contact@adictel.com
- Ireland: visit the Gamble Aware Ireland websitehttps://www.problemgambling.ie/ or call the National Gambling Helpline on 1800 753 753
- Italy: visit this websitehttps://www.gioca-responsabile.it/ or call the National Gambling helpline. Call 800 558822
- Netherlands: visit the AGOG websitehttps://www.agog.nl/ or call the AGOG National information number. Call 0900 2177721
- Spain: visit the Federación Española de Jugadores de Azar Rehabilitados websitehttps://fejar.org/#
- Portugal: visit the  Instituto de Apoio ao Jogador websitehttps://www.iaj.pt/

title: Where can I get help and advice on financial abuse?
content_text:
If you or your children are in immediate danger, call the police on 999. If you can’t talk (for example, because your abuser is present), call 999 followed by 55. This will confirm that you have a genuine emergency, and the police officer will do their best to find out your location.
Here is a list of charities, organisations, and support groups which offer expert advice on financial and domestic abuse:
- Refuge: 24/7 domestic abuse helpline for women/children – 0808 2000 247
- Women’s Aid: support via chat, email & forum
- Men’s Advice Line: help for male abuse victims – 0808 8010327
- Galop: support for LGBT+ abuse victims – 0800 999 5428
- Money Advice: info on financial abuse – 0800 138 7777

## Other countries may find some services listed below helpful
- In Ireland: please visit the  Citizens Information website https://www.citizensinformation.ie/en/
- In France: please visit the Banque de France websitehttps://www.banque-france.fr/fr/a-votre-service/particuliers/faire-face-difficultes-financieres-ou-dettes 
- In the Netherlands: your local municipality offers support with business issues, debts, income, retraining, and more. They are legally required to help with debt problems
- In Spain: you can go to the municipality institutions where you live. They can help you with advice and coaching in the field of business problems, financing, and income support
- In Portugal: visit the ePortugal website https://www.gov.pt/servicos/obter-informacoes-sobre-o-apoio-social-para-vitimas-de-violencia-domestica-centro-de-atendimento

title: Where can I get help if I'm worried about my mental health?
content_text:
Here is a list of charities, organisations, and support groups which offer expert advice on mental health.
- Samaritanshttps://www.samaritans.org/?currency=EUR: 24/7 support for anyone in distress or suicidal – call 116 123
- SHOUThttps://giveusashout.org/: free, confidential 24/7 text support – text 85258
- Mindhttps://www.mind.org.uk/: mental health advice and support – call 0300 123 3393
- Sanehttps://www.sane.org.uk/: help for those affected by mental illness – call 07984 967 708
Check the full list of NHS-recommended mental health charities, organisations and support groups that can offer expert advice on this pagehttps://www.nhs.uk/conditions/stress-anxiety-depression/mental-health-helplines/.

title: When will Revolut credit be available in my country?
content_text:
We currently don't offer credit products like loans, credit cards, or overdrafts in GB. However, we're constantly expanding our services. Keep an eye out for announcements from us. You can find our latest product updates on our site or by opting in to marketing notifications.https://help.revolut.com/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/notifications/how-do-i-manage-my-notifications/?geo-redirect=true
Unfortunately, our customer support agents won't be able to provide more information.

## Eligible countries for Personal Loans
Customers residing in the following countries are eligible to apply for our personal loans:
- Australia
- France
- Germany
- Ireland
- Italy
- Lithuania
- Poland
- Portugal
- Romania
- Spain
- United States
If you're living in one of the eligible countries but can’t see the option to apply in your app, make sure your address is correct in the Personal details section. To update your address, read this FAQhttps://help.revolut.com/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/how-do-i-change-my-country-of-residence//?geo-redirect=true.

## Eligible countries for Credit Cards
Customers residing in the following countries can apply for credit cards with Revolut:
- Brazil
- Ireland
- Lithuania
- Poland
- Spain
- United States
If you're living in one of the eligible countries but can’t see the option to apply in your app, make sure your address is correct in the Personal details section. To update your address, read this FAQhttps://help.revolut.com/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/how-do-i-change-my-country-of-residence//?geo-redirect=true.

title: What is Revolut Pro and is it free?
content_text:
Revolut Pro is a simplified business account within the personal Revolut mobile app, built to help manage your work finances. You can earn up to 1% cashback on business expenses, and use Pro’s payment acceptance tools to boost your cashback rate.

## Who can use Revolut Pro?
Pro is made for self-employed people, freelancers, side-hustlers, sole traders, and those with small, solo business ventures. You can use Pro if you’re not registered in your local business registry (depending on regional requirements). Pro isn’t for legal entities or partnerships.

## Benefits of Revolut Pro
- A separate debit card and IBAN for your business transactions 
- Up to 1% cashback on all business expenses
- Online and in-person payment acceptance tools 
- Increased cashback based on how much you sell with Pro 
- Save for tax season using tax Pockets by putting a portion of your earnings aside
- Analytics to track cash flow, earnings, as well as individual sales and spend

## How much does Revolut Pro cost?
There aren’t any monthly fees for Pro, but there are per-transaction fees for accepting customer payments. T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/pro/ apply.

title: Cancel a transaction on the Revolut Terminal
content_text:
You can cancel a transaction by pressing 'X' on the payment screen on the terminal.
If it's too late to cancel the transaction, you can always refund the customer. To do so:
- Select the payment under 'Orders'
- Select the order
- Tap 'Refund'

title: Cards and contactless payments with Revolut Terminals
content_text:
To use Revolut Terminal, you must have an approved Revolut Pro account. To accept payments, you can:
- Accept Mastercard, Visa, and American Express card payments
- Accept Google Pay, Apple Pay, and Samsung Pay
- Process chip and PIN, contactless payments, and Revolut Pay
Revolut Terminal supports transactions in the following currencies: AUD, CAD, CHF, DKK, EUR, GBP, HKD, HUF, ILS, JPY, NOK, NZD, PLN, RON, SEK, THB, TRY, USD, and ZAR. The terminal has a single transaction limit of 20,000 GBP (or currency equivalent). Fees and T&Cs apply.

title: Failed payments on the Revolut Terminal
content_text:
In the case of payment failure, payments will appear as 'Failed' or 'Declined' on the terminal screen. The customer's card won't be charged.
Transactions may fail for different reasons. The most common are:
- The customer doesn't have enough money in their account
- Customer's card is blocked or the card has encountered a limit
- The PIN entered by the customer is incorrect
- The customer is using a card we don't support
- Your internet connection is unstable

## Troubleshooting
- Ask the customer to try with a different card
- Switch to our included integrated eSIM for a stable connection
- To ensure the terminal is on the latest version, restart the device twice, preferably while connected to a mobile hotspot

title: How do I order a Revolut Terminal?
content_text:
To get a Revolut Terminal, you need to have an approved Revolut Pro Account. To do so:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu of the main Revolut app
- Tap 'Accounts' under your balance
- Tap 'Add new' and select 'Pro account'
- Follow the instructions to complete your application
Learn more about Revolut Pro account on this FAQ.

## Order a Terminal via the mobile app
Once your Revolut Pro account is approved, you can purchase a device by following the below steps:
- Go to 'Revolut Pro Account'
- Scroll to the 'Tools' section
- Tap 'Hardware'
- Select 'Revolut Terminal' or 'Revolut Lite Terminal'
- Review information and choose the device colour
- Tap 'Buy now'
- Confirm shipping address and payment method

title: How do I log in to my Revolut Terminal?
content_text:
To set up your Revolut Terminal, you must have a fully active Revolut Pro account.

## Steps to connect your Revolut Terminal
- Turn on the Revolut Terminal. If it doesn't power on, open the battery cover and ensure cables are securely connected
- Choose 'Login with Revolut'
- Enter your Revolut email, passcode, and the 6-digit SMS code
- Create your security pin code. This will be used to create refunds and access reports

## Location details
On first login, you'll be prompted to create your location by entering business details — use accurate info as it appears on receipts.

title: eSIM on Revolut Terminals
content_text:
Revolut Terminals support mobile connectivity via eSIM, allowing you to accept payments any time, anywhere, and without relying on Wi-Fi.
You can use the eSIM free of charge within the country your activity operates in.

## How much does the eSIM for Revolut Terminals cost?
The eSIM is completely free to use with your Revolut Terminal.

## How to activate the eSIM 
The first time you set up the terminal, it must be connected to Wi-Fi to download the latest updates and activate the eSIM. Follow these steps to activate the eSIM:
- Connect your device to a Wi-Fi network
- Make sure your device is updated and running the latest software. If you're unsure, restart it twice to trigger any pending updates
- Go to 'More' in the menu and select 'Network' and then 'Mobile network'
- Tap 'eSIM' and switch it on
If you don’t see the eSIM option, your device may not be up to date. Restart it twice while connected to hotspot, then try again.

## No network after activating my eSIM
If your eSIM is activated but you’re not getting any network signal, tap 'eSIM' to open advanced settings and check the following settings:
- Make sure mobile data is turned on
- Turn off 'Automatically select network', and try connecting manually to another available network

title: I'm having trouble using my Revolut Terminal
content_text:
You might have trouble using your Revolut Terminal for several reasons:
- You don't have an active Revolut Pro account: check if you have any requests in-app
- Your terminal's internet connection is unstable: without an active connection, you won't be able to take payments. We advise you to connect your device to our included eSIM
- Your Revolut Terminal is not up to date. Restart your device twice to force the update

title: Sales using a Revolut Pro product catalogue
content_text:
You'll need to set up your catalogue in your Revolut Pro payment account first. Go to 'Revolut Pro', 'Tools', then 'Products' to be able to create catalogue sales.

## Create a catalogue on Revolut Pro
To manage your products, tap '+ New product', or 'Create new' near 'All products'. Enter the name, category, unit (item/kg), tax rate, then save your product. To edit or delete, tap the product and update details, or select 'Delete', then confirm.
To create a category, tap 'Create new' next to 'Categories'. Enter the category name, pick a colour, then save. To edit or delete, click the category and update details, or select 'Delete', then confirm.
To manage tax rates, tap 'Select tax rate', then 'Manage tax rates'. Tap 'Add new', then enter the name and percentage. If you need to edit or delete, tap the rate and update details, or select 'Delete', then confirm.

## How to make a sale from the catalogue
- Select your product by searching in the product list, or by choosing from your set grid
- Select 'Checkout' to take payment directly, or use the cart icon to open the sale for editing before payment
The product catalogue can only be used with your account's main currency.

title: Edit the time on my Revolut Terminal
content_text:
To change the time on the Revolut Terminal follow these steps:
- Go to 'More' on your device
- Select 'Device settings'
- Choose 'Time and date'
- Set the time
You can switch between AM, PM, or 24-hour display formats.

title: Warranty on Revolut Terminals
content_text:
We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you return your Revolut Terminal or Revolut Terminal Lite to us for any reason within 30 days of the purchase date, we'll refund its cost to your Revolut Pro account.
Revolut Terminals (both Revolut Terminal and Revolut Terminal Lite) come with a 1-year warranty. If you find any faults in your device within this period, we'll replace it free of charge.
For more information, read the T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/payment-terms-cardreader?geo-redirect=true. For help with a warranty or to request a return, reach out to Revolut Support via the in-app chat.

title: What are Revolut Terminals?
content_text:
Revolut Terminals are payment acceptance devices that allow you to accept in-person physical card payments using chip and PIN, contactless payments, Revolut Pay, and digital wallet payments (such as through Apple Pay or Google Pay).
Revolut Terminals support all major card providers including Mastercard, Visa, Maestro, and Amex.

## Main features of Revolut Terminals
- Revolut Terminals have an all-in-one design with a large touchscreen. They’re easy to set up, so you can start taking payments quickly and easily. Connect using Wi-Fi or the built-in eSIM

## Types of Revolut Terminals
- The Revolut Terminal includes a built-in printer for printing receipts. The Revolut Lite Terminal offers the same payment functionality but doesn't include a printer, offering digital receipts only

title: When will I receive my Revolut Terminal?
content_text:
Your Revolut Terminal is usually shipped within the next business day after your order is confirmed. Once shipped, delivery typically takes 2 business days.

## Tracking and delivery updates
A tracking link will become available once your Terminal has been shipped. You can find it in your confirmation email or in 'Order history' within your Revolut Pro account.
If you experience any delivery delays or need to change your delivery address, contact the carrier directly via the tracking link.

title: Failed payment on Tap to Pay on iPhone
content_text:
The performance of contactless cards can vary based on the card design, for example, depending on the card material or the location of the antenna. As a result, some cards connect more easily than others.

## Trouble accepting ‌a contactless payment
- Ask the customer to hold their contactless payment card directly on top of your iPhone, lining the chip up with the edge of the tap area for several seconds
- If the card still doesn't read, ask the customer to slide the chip directly over the notch on your device
- Ensure that the Revolut Business app and phone are on the last iOS version
- Confirm you have accepted the Tap to Pay on iPhone terms via Apple Business Connect

## If your iPhone says ‌'Try a different card'
This means the customer's card isn't supported. Revolut supports payments from Mastercard, Visa, and American Express debit and credit cards, as well as Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other digital wallets.
To use Tap to Pay on iPhone, you must have 'Create in-store payments' permission assigned to your profile. Ask your business owner or account admin to assign the correct permissions to your profile.

## The payments are not accepted
- You are not in a supported country to use our product. Review our terms and conditionshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/tap-to-pay/ for more information
- You are currently using a roaming connection or a VPN, which may restrict access to this service
- Your customer’s bank has refused the transaction. Ask them to try again with a different card

title: Can I accept payments with Revolut Pro?
content_text:
Whether you’re selling in-person or online, you can use our tools to accept payments, then settle all your earnings in your Pro account. You can accept payments using any of the following methods:

## In-person payment methods
- Revolut Reader: Revolut Reader/help/more/revolut-pro/accepting-customer-payments/revpro-revolut-reader-and-how-do-i-use-it is made to accept card and contactless payments in-person, wherever you sell. It doesn’t come with any subscription fees, just a fixed one-time cost. Product availability varies by market. Fees and T&Cs https://www.revolut.com/legal/business-acquiring/apply
- Tap to Pay on iPhone: with Tap to Pay on iPhone/help/more/revolut-pro/accepting-customer-payments/tap-to-pay-on-iphone-to-take-payments and Revolut Pro, you can accept all types of in-person, contactless payments right on your iPhone — from physical debit and credit cards to Apple Pay and other digital wallets. Product availability varies by market. Fees and T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/tap-to-pay/ apply

## Online payment methods
- Payment Links: from custom Payment Links to professional invoices, request payments from customers quickly, wherever you are. Share them via any channel and give your customers their choice of simple and secure payment methods. Fees and T&Cs https://www.revolut.com/legal/payment-terms-paylinks/apply
- Shopify plugin: our pre-built plugin is a fast and simple way to add Revolut Payment Gateway directly to your Shopify checkout — no coding required. Fees and T&Cs https://www.revolut.com/legal/business-acquiring/apply

title: How much does it cost to accept payments with Revolut Pro?
content_text:
Once you start receiving card payments, you'll be charged a per-transaction processing fee based on the total sale amount. This rate varies based on your payment acceptance method, and the type of card your customer uses.

## Processing fee for in-person payments
- For Revolut Reader transactions: 1.5% of total sale amount
- For Tap to Pay on iPhone transactions: 1.7% of total sale amount

## Processing fee for online payments
- For domestic personal Visa or Mastercard cards: 1.0% of sale amount + £0.20 (or currency equivalent)
- For Revolut Pay transactions: 1% of sale amount + £0.20 (or currency equivalent)
- For international and commercial cards: 2.8% of sale amount + £0.20 (or currency equivalent)

## Chargeback fees and where to find fee details
There’s a chargeback fee if a customer disputes a transaction made with you. If the claim is ruled in your favour, that fee will be refunded to your Pro account along with the disputed amount.
To see the full details of a transaction, including any applicable processing and/or currency exchange fees, go to ‘Transactions’ in your Pro account and select the specific payment. T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/pro/ apply.

title: What are Payment Links and how do I use them?
content_text:
Payment Links let you request online and in-person payments easily, even if you don’t have a website. You can send links via any channel — whether that’s email, text, invoices, QR codes, or social media.
Once customers receive your link, they’re directed to a secure checkout page where they can complete purchases or settle invoices. You can reuse or set limits on how many times you want to use a link, so you don’t have to create the same one twice.
To let customers know it’s you, you can add your brand colours or logo to your secure checkout page. We won’t charge any fees for creating or sending Payment Links — we’ll only charge the relevant fees for successful payments.

## Fees for Payment Link transactions
- For domestic personal Visa or Mastercard cards: 1.0% + £0.20 (or currency equivalent)
- For international and commercial cards: 2.8% + £0.20 (or currency equivalent)
All percentages shown above are of the total transaction value. T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/payment-terms-paylinks/ apply.

title: When do payments arrive in my Pro account?
content_text:
## Waiting on your first Pro payment?
There’s a 7 day waiting period for your first payout. This is necessary for risk mitigation and can't be waived under any circumstances.

## How do I unlock 24-hour settlement?
Your settlement time will go from 7 days to 24 hours after you successfully process one in-person sale or accept a certain number of online payments without any chargebacks. Once you unlock 24-hour settlement, all future payments will land in your account within 24 hours.
Settlement timeframes may vary based on your transaction history and whether your account requires any additional checks. T&Cs applyhttps://www.revolut.com/legal/business-acquiring/.

title: Install the Shopify plugin for Revolut Pro
content_text:
## In the Revolut app:
- From the 'Pro' home screen, select ‘New sale’ 
- Choose 'Explore ecommerce plugins' and 'Install' 
- Enter your Shopify URL 
- Follow the steps to install the plugin 
On the 'Shopify plugin' page, click 'Get started'. We may ask you to enter your URL for verification purposes. Once that's done, wait for confirmation, and repeat the steps above. After your URL has been verified:
- Follow the instructions outlined above and choose ‘Go to Shopify’. You'll be redirected to the Shopify app 
- Log in to your Pro account and authorise the integration
- Go back to the Shopify app and click ‘Activate’ 

## From the Shopify app store:
- Select ‘Revolut Payment Gateway’
- Enter your store URL and log in 
- Review the data shared, and click ‘Install’
You'll be redirected to a Revolut page where you'll need to select ‘Revolut Pro’ as your account type. We may ask you to enter your URL for verification purposes. Then, wait for confirmation and repeat the steps above. Once that's done: 
- Log in to your Pro account and authorise the integration
- Go back to the Shopify app and click ‘Activate’

title: Revolut Pro invoices
content_text:
Invoices allow you to accept card payments from your customers. They can be much more detailed than payment requests. For example, they can include information about payment items and taxes, as well as payment links.

## Create a Revolut Pro payment request invoice
In the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Scroll down and tap 'Pro'
- Tap 'New Sale' and choose 'Invoice'
- Fill in the required fields
- Select the eye symbol to preview your invoice
- Tap 'Send invoice' to share the invoice with your customer

## Cancel a payment request
In the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Scroll down and tap 'Pro'
- Tap 'See all sales'
- Select the required invoice and tap 'Cancel'
If your customer has already paid the invoice, you can issue a refund from the invoice entry you selected. However, if it’s been more than 30 days since you created the invoice, it will have expired and no action is needed.

title: Warranty on the Revolut Reader
content_text:
## Refunds
We offer a 30-day money back guarantee for Revolut Reader purchases. If you return the device to us for any reason within 30 days of the purchase date, we'll refund its cost to your Revolut account.

## Replacements
The Revolut Reader also comes with a one-year warranty. If you find any faults with your device within this period, we'll replace it free of charge.

## More information
For more information, read the Revolut Reader and Revolut Terminal Terms.https://www.revolut.com/legal/payment-terms-cardreader/ For help with a refund or a replacement, get in touch with our support team via the in-app chat.

title: What is Revolut Reader and how do I use it?
content_text:
Revolut Reader is a quick and simple way to accept in-person, contactless payments, whether you’re selling at the counter or on the go. The reader comes with a one-off cost, followed by a flat 1.5% fee for each transaction made through the reader. T&Cs apply.

## Order the Revolut Reader
To order a Revolut Reader, you need to open a Revolut Pro account first. Once it's approved:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu of your Revolut app
- Under your balance, select 'Accounts'
- Select your Revolut Pro account and tap 'New sale'
- Select 'Card reader' and 'Order a card reader'
- Follow the steps to confirm your order
Learn more in this FAQ/help/more/revolut-pro/who-can-use-pro-and-how-to-get-started.

## Connect the reader
After receiving your Revolut Reader, simply connect it to your Revolut app via Bluetooth. We'll handle all the setup for you, and make sure it's ready for immediate use once the updates are finished. For detailed instructions, read our guidehttps://cdn.revolut.com/pdf/Revolut%20Reader%20User%20Guide.pdf.
Revolut Reader pairs with the Revolut app via Bluetooth on your mobile device, which must have Wi-Fi or mobile network connectivity for transactions.

## Pro account payment timelines
- For your first payout, there’s a 7-day waiting period. This is necessary for risk mitigation and cannot be waived under any circumstances
- 24-hour settlement:  your settlement time will go from 7 days to 24 hours after you successfully process one in-person sale or accept a certain number of online payments without any chargebacks
Once you unlock 24-hour settlement, all future payments will arrive in your account within 24 hours. Settlement timeframes may vary based on your transaction history and whether your account requires any additional checks.

title: Using Tap to Pay on iPhone to take payments
content_text:
## What is Tap to Pay on iPhone?
Tap to Pay on iPhone with Revolut Pro turns your iPhone into a card reader. You can accept in-person, contactless payments directly on your iPhone with a fee of 1.7% of the total transaction value.
Tap to Pay on iPhone supports all major card providers including Mastercard, Visa, Maestro, and Amex.
You can only accept payments using Tap to Pay on iPhone in your base or local currency.

## How to use Tap to Pay on iPhone?
To set up Tap to Pay on iPhone, you need to open a Revolut Pro account first and have it approved. To learn more consult this FAQ/help/more/revolut-pro/who-can-use-pro-and-how-to-get-started. Once approved follow these steps to activate it:
- Select ‘Pro’ from the ‘Accounts’ dropdown under your balance
- Select ‘New sale’
- Select ‘Tap to Pay on iPhone’ and sign into your Apple Account to accept the T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/tap-to-pay/ before your first sale
- Ask your customer to hold their card or device horizontally over the contactless symbol at the top of your iPhone for a few seconds
- When you see the ‘Done’ tick, the card read is complete and the transaction is being processed

## Android availability
Tap to Pay on iPhone is not yet available on Android.

title: Why should I accept payments with Revolut Pro?
content_text:
## Various payment tools to choose from
You can accept payments in person and online using whatever method is best for your business and customers. Whether that’s Payment Links, Revolut Reader, Tap to Pay on iPhone, or our Shopify plugin.

## Offer customers more ways to pay
Let your customers choose their preferred payment method — whether that’s Visa, Mastercard, or a digital wallet.

## Settles your sales in one place
All your earnings settle in your Revolut Pro account for a clear overview of your business finances. Analytics and insights let you manage your overall cashflow, expenses, individual sales, and product performance.

title: How do I add funds to my Pro account?
content_text:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Select 'Accounts' under your balance and select your Prohttps://www.revolut.com/app/revolut-pro/ account
- Tap 'Add money'
- Your default payment method is pre-selected and will be used to add funds. To change to another payment method, tap the default payment method
- Choose from one of the available options — external bank transfers, card payment, digital wallets, or other Revolut accounts — to add funds to your account

## How do I move money between accounts?
You can move money easily between Revolut accounts. Additionally, you can schedule recurring transfers so you never run low on funds. To move money:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Select 'Accounts' under your balance and select your Prohttps://www.revolut.com/app/revolut-pro/ account
- Tap 'Move'
- Choose the account and currency to move money from
- Enter the amount
- If you want to schedule a one-time transfer or set up a recurring transfer, tap the 'Calendar' icon

title: How to close a Revolut Pro account
content_text:
- Tap ‘Move’ to send your remaining balance to another account
- Go to your Revolut Pro Home Page
- Select ‘More’ 
- Select 'Details' and scroll down 
- Tap ‘Close Pro Account’ and confirm closure
If you have pending cashback or sales, wait until they have completed. You should be able to see the estimated completion date in-app.Then, move the money to your personal account and close the account using the steps above. 
If you’re not able to transfer your money from your Pro account to your personal account, contact our support team using the in-app chat. Once closed, you won’t be able to see your Pro account in the account switcher.

## To download statements after closing your account
- Tap your initial in the top-right corner 
- Select ‘Documents & Statements’
- Select ‘Pro’
- Tap ‘Account Statement’ and select the time period you want the statement for
- Follow the steps to generate the statement

title: Difference between Revolut Pro and Revolut Business
content_text:
## Revolut Business
Revolut Business offers a full suite of advanced features for businesses of all sizes — from startups and SMEs to enterprises, legal entities, and fully-incorporated companies.
- Team and individual cards with spend controls
- Exchange 25+ currencies at the interbank rate (within allowance, during market hours) and fix rates with FX forward contracts
- A dedicated business savings account with competitive rates
- Automated salary, supplier, and tax payments
- Multi-user access with individual permissions and approval workflows
- Integrations for HR, accounting, expenses, productivity apps, and APIs
- A mobile app and full desktop interface
- Online and in-person payment acceptance solutions

## Revolut Pro
Revolut Pro account has tools to help freelancers, sole traders, and those with small, solo business ventures organise their finances in a separate account within the personal Revolut app:
- Cashback on business expenses 
- Tax management features 
- Payment acceptance solutions
- Cashflow analytics
Get to know more about the differences between both accounts on this page.https://www.revolut.com/pro-vs-business/

title: How to set up Direct Debits in Pro
content_text:
Direct Debits are supported in Revolut Pro. To set one up, give your bank account details to the provider you want to set up the Direct Debit with.

## To see your account details:
- Go to your Revolut Pro Home Page
- Select ‘More’ 
- Select 'Details' 
Always make sure to have enough balance to cover the Direct Debit.

title: What features are available with Revolut Pro?
content_text:
Revolut Pro is a separate professional work account that lives in the main Revolut app. It comes with a separate IBAN, payment acceptance tools, dedicated debit card to earn up to 1% cashback on business expenses, and other financial analytic tools.

## Earning cashback with Pro
The more you sell through your Pro account, the more cashback you can earn on your spend — up to 1% extra on top of your plan cashback rate. This applies up to a maximum of £100 cashback per month. Here’s how it works:
- +0.3% once you reach £1,000 in monthly revenue and complete 5 monthly sales
- +0.6% once you reach £5,000 in monthly revenue and complete 10 monthly sales
- +1% once you reach £10,000 in monthly revenue and complete 20 monthly sales

## Payment acceptance tools
You can use our online and in-person tools to accept payments and settle all your earnings in your Pro account. You can accept payments using:
- Payment Links
- Revolut Reader
- Tap to Pay on iPhone
- Shopify plugin
Payment Processing T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/business-acquiring/ apply.

## Finance tools available with Pro
- Analytics: check your overall cashflow, total earnings, or individual sales and spend — all without the manual number-crunching
- Tax Pockets: put a portion of your earnings aside — set a fixed percentage for all sales, or customise the VAT percentage for each item in your product catalogue
Revolut Pro T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/pro/ apply.

title: How do I move money out of my Revolut Pro account?
content_text:
## To send money to an external account
- In the main Revolut app, go to 'Payments' on the bottom menu 
- Select '+' on the top right corner
- Select how and who you want to pay. You can transfer to existing payees or add new payee information 
- Choose your Pro account as the account to send money from, enter the amount, and confirm the transfer

## To move money to your personal Revolut account
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Select 'Accounts' under your balance and select your Pro accounthttps://www.revolut.com/app/revolut-pro/
- Tap 'Move' 
- Select your personal Revolut account as the receiving account
- Enter the amount and currency you want to transfer and complete the transfer

title: Order a Revolut Pro card
content_text:
In the Revolut mobile app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap the card icon in the top-right corner
- Tap 'Add new'
- Choose 'Pro' and follow the instructions
Revolut Pro is available to customers in the UK and EEA (excluding Liechtenstein, Luxembourg, and Switzerland). Revolut Pro T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/pro/?geo-redirect=true apply.

title: How does Revolut Pro cashback work and how can I boost it?
content_text:
Customers who spend with their dedicated Pro debit card can earn up to 1% cashback on business expenses, depending on their plan:
- Standard: 0.4% cashback 
- Premium: 0.6% cashback 
- Metal: 0.8% cashback 
- Ultra: 1% cashback
You’ll earn cashback on any domestic or international transactions made using your Pro debit card, except transactions with excluded merchants (like securities or cash transactions). See section 8 in our T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/pro/ for more information.

## How can I boost my cashback rate?
The more payments you accept with Revolut Pro, the more cashback you earn on your spend. This can be up to 1% extra on top of your card subscription, with a maximum boost of £100 cashback per month.
- +0.3% once you reach £1,000 in monthly revenue and complete 5 monthly sales
- +0.6% once you reach £5,000 in monthly revenue and complete 10 monthly sales
- +1% once you reach £10,000 in monthly revenue and complete 20 monthly sales
Your booster is reassessed at the end of the month following the month it was activated. If you meet the criteria again, the boost will continue into the next month. If you don't meet the criteria, the rate will revert to your plan's rate, or to a lower booster level.

## When is cashback paid and how do I check it?
Cashback is paid into your Pro account on the first of every month. To find out more about your exact rate in-app, go to the ‘Cashback’ section in your Pro account.

title: Pro account under review or payments not working
content_text:
If your Pro account review is in progress or pending, or if you can’t accept payments, this typically means we need additional information about your business or identity. Make sure to check for any emails, push notifications, or in-app banners to verify your details.

## Why can’t I accept payments?
As a financial services provider, we’re subject to strict rules and regulations to stay compliant and prevent fraudulent activity.
We might put restrictions on your Pro account for different reasons, including unusual activity, incomplete account setup, exceeding processing thresholds, or payment blocks from the card issuers.

## How to remove restrictions
If your Pro account is restricted, it might be because we need additional proof of business activity, such as:
- A URL linked to your business activity — this could be your business website, social media profile, or geolink (e.g. Google Maps)
- Proof of registration
- License or professional qualification
- Certified financials
- Client contracts or invoices
- T&Cs

title: How can I redeem my Pro Perks offers?
content_text:
You need an active Revolut Pro account to redeem Pro Perks offers. To redeem an offer:
- Go to the Pro home screen and scroll down to the ‘Tools’ section
- Select ‘Pro Perks’
- Browse the available offers and select the one you want to activate
- Review the offer details and follow the instructions. You’ll be redirected to the partner’s page to complete the process
Pro perks aren't automatically applied to your account and must be redeemed individually.

title: What is Pro Perks?
content_text: A dedicated hub in your Revolut Pro account where you can access curated discounts and offers to help you save on essential tools for running your everyday professional activities.

title: What are Pro Pockets?
content_text:
Pockets are a feature that allow you to create sub-accounts, which you can use for savings or to put money aside for any reason. A Pocket is a separate account listed under your main account, and Pockets can be used to group all transactions for different purposes.
You can choose between Tax Pockets (which have additional functionalities related to transferring money for VAT) and regular Pockets. To open a Pro regular Pocket:
- Go to ‘Accounts’, click ‘Add New’, and choose ‘Freelancer’ tab 
- Click on ‘Regular’, and click ‘Get Started’
- Give your Pocket a name and choose its currency 

## What is the Pro Tax Pocket?
The Tax Pocket is a sub-pocket within your Revolut Pro account, designed specifically for setting money aside for taxes. You can set up automatic transfers to this Pocket based on VAT percentages, create recurring schedules, or make manual one-off transfers.
To open a Pro Tax Pocket:
- Go to ‘Accounts’, click ‘Add New’ and choose the ‘Freelancer’ tab 
- Click ‘Regular’ and select ‘Get Started’
- Give your Tax Pocket a name and choose its currency
- You can opt in to have a percentage of your sales (per product or per total sales) put aside in this Tax Pocket

title: Why was my document not accepted for Revolut Pro?
content_text:
If the documents you provided during your Pro application weren't accepted, it's likely because they didn’t meet the format, clarity, or content requirements. You need to provide proof of business activity that contains your name and matches the business information provided in your application.

## Accepted proof of business activity
- A Uniform Resource Locator (URL) linked to your business activity — could be your business website, social media profile, or geolink (e.g. Google Maps)
- Proof of registration
- Licence or professional qualification certification
- Certified financials
- Client contracts or invoices
- terms and conditions

title: Why was my URL not accepted for Revolut Pro?
content_text:
Revolut requires a valid URL for your business website, social media profile, or mobile app to complete account activation.
If your URL wasn’t accepted, it’s probably because it doesn’t meet the required format, content, or doesn’t match the other business information you provided, i.e. the nature of business declared at the time of account creation.

## What is considered an acceptable URL?
The URL should:
- be accessible (we don’t accept URLs under construction)
- match your business description provided at the time of account creation
- be owned by you — have your name or contact information
You can enter links to your website, social media channel, geolink (e.g. Google Maps), or any platform linked to your business activity.

title: Where can I find my Revolut Pro account in-app?
content_text:
## If you don't have a Pro account
You can sign up for a Pro account in the Revolut app by following these steps:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'Accounts' under your balance
- Tap 'Add new' and select 'Pro account'
- Follow the instructions to complete your application

## If you already have a Pro account
Open the Revolut app and tap ‘Accounts’ below your balance, then scroll down to find Prohttps://www.revolut.com/app/revolut-pro/.
If you want to make your Pro account easier to find, you can add it to your favourites. To do so:
- Go to ‘Accounts’ under your balance
- Press and hold your Pro account
- Select ‘Pin to favourites’

## Where do I find my Pro account details?
Once you have created your Pro accounthttps://www.revolut.com/app/revolut-pro/:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'Accounts' under your balance
- Select your Pro account
- Tap 'More' to view your account details or generate statements

title: Who can use Revolut Pro and how do I get started?
content_text:
Pro is made for freelancers, side-hustlers, sole traders, and those who are self-employed or have small, solo business ventures. You can use Pro if you’re not registered in your local business registry (depending on regional requirements). Pro isn’t for legal entities or partnerships.

## How do I open an account?
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu of the main Revolut app
- Tap 'Accounts' under your balance
- Tap 'Add new' and select 'Pro account'
- Follow the instructions to complete your application

## What does the application involve?
To apply for a Revolut Pro account, you’ll need to:
- Choose the category that best describes your business
- Add a description about your products or services
Based on the information provided, we may ask for proof of business activity or a URL linked to your business activity, like proof of registration, a business website, social media page, or geolink (e.g. Google Maps).

title: Accessing the Retail Web App
content_text:
Revolut provides 2-factor (2FA) authentication, for added security when logging into the web apphttps://app.revolut.com/start. Enter your phone number and Revolut passcode, then verify with 2FA by confirming through a push notification or by providing a one-time password from your email or phone.
Access to your account will be limited if you use email or SMS authentication, as they are less secure than mobile push.
However, if you use a mobile push, you will have full access to your Revolut account. This extra layer of security ensures that only authorised individuals can access your account.

title: What features are supported on the Web App?
content_text:
If you have full access permissions, you can do the following on the Revolut retail web app:
- View account details, cards, and transactions 
- Download account statements
- Change your PIN
- Freeze cards
- Get in-app chat support 
Stay tuned — we're working on adding more features! If you have limited access permissions, you can only use certain features that secure your account, like freezing your cards.

title: Security and data privacy
content_text:
## How does Revolut handle personal data?
Regardless of which Revolut entity or local national branch of Revolut Bank UAB provides financial services to you, your personal data will be collected and processed in accordance with our Revolut Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/privacy-policy/. The migration will have no impact on your data subject's rights.

## Will I have to provide more personal data during migration?
You may need to provide additional documentation, such as a national ID or information, as per the regulatory requirements of the local national branch of Revolut Bank UAB or any other separate Revolut entity.
This is to ensure compliance with local laws and regulations. Any personal data provided during this process will be processed in accordance with Revolut Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/privacy-policy/.

## How is my personal information protected?
Physical and technical measures set out in Section 13 of our Revolut Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/privacy-policy/ will continue to apply after migration to any local national branch of Revolut Bank UAB or separate Revolut entity.

title: How do I close my account?
content_text:
Thinking of leaving? Switch to our Standard plan instead and keep your account. You'll still enjoy many features, with no monthly plan fees. If you still want to close your account, follow the steps below.

## Closure requirements
- All your accounts, Pockets, and currency accounts have a balance of zero
- You have no pending transactions. Check if you have a pending transaction by tapping this linkhttps://app.revolut.com/transactionsrevolut://app/transaction-list
- You have the latest version of the Revolut app installed
- You've downgraded your plan to Standard¹
- You've closed your investment account¹ 
- You have no active subscriptions or chargeback requests
- You have no active Kids & Teens accounts¹ 
- You have no active insurances through Revolut¹

## How to close your account in the app
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and 'Close account'
Download and keep any statements you may need for future reference. We'll send you a confirmation of the closure once you've completed the process. 
For details on the data we retain after your account closure, read our Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/legal/privacy/?geo-redirect=true.

## If your balance is too low for an outbound transfer
- Top up your account to meet the minimum amount required for outbound transfers
- Transfer the remaining funds to a Revolut friend via an internal transfer
- Donate the remaining funds to a worthy cause of your choice using our in-app Donations feature¹. To donate, you can use this link
If you want to close your account and no longer have access to your Revolut app, email us at support@revolut.com.
¹ For customers aged 18 or above only

title: Getting started with AIR
content_text:
## What is AIR?
AIR (AI by Revolut) is your new in-app assistant. It’s an execution engine designed to help you manage your money, use Revolut features, and complete daily tasks instantly through a simple conversation.
It can support everyday needs like tracking spending, managing subscriptions, exploring travel options, or understanding financial topics.
See terms and conditionshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/rita-disclaimer/ and Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/legal/privacy/ for more details.

## What can I ask AIR?
You can ask AIR to perform tasks or provide insights across your entire Revolut account. Try these tasks:
- Track your spending
- Block a merchant / future payments
- Check your stock value
- Get a 3GB eSIM for your trip

## What AIR can do
AIR helps you understand your finances by providing insights into spending patterns, trends, and activity.
It can also help you take actions in the app based on your request, as well as explore travel options and view information about your investments.
AIR is continuously improving and being rolled out to customers gradually to ensure the best possible experience. If you don't see it yet, keep your app updated. Your access is arriving shortly.

## How to access AIR
You can access AIR simply:
- Swiping down from the middle of any main screen in the app (not from product pages or menus)
- Going to Profile, 'Chats', and 'AIR'

title: Getting started with Revolut
content_text:
## Eligibility
You must be over the age of 16 and be a legal resident of a supported country/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/verifying-identity/what-countries-are-supported.
People aged between 6 and 15 can have a Kids & Teens accounthttps://www.revolut.com/revolut-under-18-benefits-parents-and-guardians/?geo-redirect=true opened on their behalf.
If you're under the age of 18, you won't have full access to all Revolut features, such as paid plans, trading, crypto, credit products and purchases, RevPoints or gambling establishments. For more information, see ‘Schedule 1 - Independent Teen Account’ in our T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/terms/.

## Holding a single personal account
You can only have one personal Revolut account, even across different countries. 
If you’re over 18 years old, after you open a personal account, you have the option to open a Joint account or open a Pro account¹. T&Cs apply.

## Required information
To open and use a Revolut account, you must provide the following:
- A valid mobile phone number
- A valid email address
- Personal information, including but not limited to: current address, date of birth, full name, and citizenship(s)
- A valid government-issued document for identity verification
- A selfie for account security
You may also be asked a few questions about yourself and the purpose of your account. These questions won't impact your eligibility. For more help with uploading a document, check these FAQs in our Help Centre.

## Is Revolut free?
You can open and use a Revolut account at no cost. If you're over 18 years old, you can upgrade your account to one of our paid plans to save money on fees and access ‌additional benefits¹. T&Cs apply.
Compare all plans and benefits side-by-side on this pagehttps://www.revolut.com/our-pricing-plans/?geo-redirect=true.
¹ For customers aged 18 or above only

title: How to contact Revolut Support
content_text:
Getting support from Revolut is simple and secure. Whether you’ve lost your card, need help with a payment, or want to ask a quick question, our Revolut Support team is available 24/7, 365 days a year — even on Sundays.
If you have a question, we may have already answered it in our Help Centre. Before you reach out via chat, check the many articles there which may contain the help you need. 
If you’ve spotted something unusual on your account and think you could be a victim of fraud or a scam, head to the in-app chat and report it straight away. Our team will help secure your account.

## How do I chat with Revolut?
You can reach the Revolut Support team via the secure, in-app chat. Our chat support offers fast, personalised help in 100+ languages. To chat with us:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Help'
- Scroll down and tap 'Support' to start a chat with us

## How do I call Revolut?
Metal, Premium, and Ultra plan customers have access to secure, in-app calls, and can speak with our support team directly. If you're a customer on one of these plans, follow these steps to call us:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner 
- Select 'Help'
- Scroll down and tap 'Metal Support', 'Premium Support', or 'Ultra support' (depending on your plan)
- For Metal or Premium, on the chat screen, go to the Revolut Support profile in the top-right corner, and tap 'Call' to start a call with us. For Ultra, on the chat screen, tap the call button in the top-right corner, next to the Revolut Support profile

## Can I email Revolut?
If you’re having trouble logging in to the app and can’t access the chat, you can contact us via email at support@revolut.com. Our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
If you've lost your device or access to your account, visit our page on reporting a lost devicehttps://www.revolut.com/report-lost-device/.

title: Joint account card payments
content_text:
## Plan limits and benefits
Joint account expenses are shared. Any applicable fees are taken from the Joint account. It isn’t possible to use your existing personal account cards with a Joint account or to link your Joint account to your personal account card. You need to order a separate card to use with the Joint account.
- If you and the other Joint account holder have different Revolut plans, you'll have separate limits and benefits for your Joint account
- Transactions count towards your personal limits and benefits, regardless of whether they're made from your personal account or Joint account
You can find more details on limits and benefits in our Personal Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/terms/?geo-redirect=true.

## How to withdraw money from your Joint account
In the Revolut app: 
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select your Joint account
- Select 'More' and 'Withdraw'
Both account holders can withdraw money from the Joint account at any time. The other account holder will be notified about the amount withdrawn.

title: Managing joint account ownership
content_text:
## My co-holder is unable to manage the joint account
If the other account holder is no longer in a position to make decisions in relation to the joint account due to various circumstances, you can keep the account. Visit our Joint Accounts T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/joint-accounts/?geo-redirect=true page to find out what actions are required.

## I don't want to share the account anymore
You can close the joint account directly in-app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select your joint account
- Tap 'More' and 'Details'
- Scroll down and tap 'Close joint account'

## What happens if a joint account holder passes away?
As both account holders share the money in the joint account, if one account holder passes away, we take certain legal actions depending on the region you're located in. We may ask for documents from competent authorities evidencing that.
If both account holders pass away, and we’re notified, we'll freeze the joint account and await the applicable forms from their personal representatives.
For more information, visit our Joint Accounts T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/joint-accounts/?geo-redirect=true.

title: I want to close my Joint account
content_text:
You can close a Joint account directly in-app, but first, you need to bring the account balance to zero. Either of the Joint account holders can withdraw money without needing the other's consent.

## How to close the Joint account
In the Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select your Joint account
- Tap 'Details'
- Scroll down and select 'Close Joint account'
Once you close the Joint account, we'll deactivate any cards linked to the Joint account. We'll also send ‌both co-holders their Joint account statements by email.

title: Your Joint account statement
content_text:
## Download a statement
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select your Joint account
- Tap 'More'
- Select 'Statement', the timeframe, and document type
- Tap 'Generate'
If you decide to close your Joint account, we'll email ‌both of you your Joint account statements.

title: Adding money to a Joint account
content_text:
## Add money from your personal Revolut account
In the Revolut app: 
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select your Joint account
- Tap 'Add money' and follow the instructions

## Add money with a bank transfer
To receive a bank transfer, you’ll need to share your Joint account details with the sender or sender's bank. To view your Joint account details in-app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select your Joint account
- Tap 'More' and 'Details'
You can also share your account details with your employer to receive your salary into the Joint account.

## Exchanging currencies into your Joint account
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select your Joint account
- Tap 'Move' and proceed

## How to access a currency Joint account
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Scroll down and select the Pocket in the relevant currency
Currency exchanges can’t be cancelled once completed. You can only revert them by making a new exchange (exchanging the money back into your base currency). Given exchange rates are variable, you may not end up with the full amount back.

title: Setting up a Joint account
content_text:
A Joint account is a shared account between two Revolut customers. It’s not just for partners and spouses — friends, family, and housemates can open an account to simplify expense sharing. Both account holders can add, withdraw, manage, and spend money in the Joint account.
Read our Joint Accounts T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/joint-accounts/?geo-redirect=true to learn more.
To apply for a Joint account (or manage your current Joint account), use this link.

## Requirements for opening a Joint account
- Be at least 18 years old
- Have a personal Revolut account and have passed our identity verification checks
- Live in the same country as the person you’re opening the account with
- Both Joint account owners must belong to the same Revolut entity. For example, Revolut Bank UAB. To check your Revolut entity, tap your profile icon in the top left corner and scroll to the bottom of the page
- Not have another Revolut Joint account, or a pending invite for one
- Already have the person you want to open the account with in your contacts. If not, send a small amount of money to their Revolut account to make them a contact before you try to open a Joint account together. To read more about sending money to other Revolut customers, read this FAQ/help/transfers/internal-transfers/send-or-request-money-from-other-revolut-customers

## Open a Joint account in-app
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts' and 'Add new'
- Select 'Joint' and follow the instructions
The other applicant needs to accept your invitation.

## Paid plans and Joint accounts
- Each account holder has their own usage limits based on their individual Revolut plan
- Joint account fees are deducted from the joint account only
- Insurance benefits don't apply to Joint account activity
- Savings accounts can't be opened on Joint accounts
If one of the Joint account holders has a Metal or Ultra plan, any eligible card payments made with your Joint account card will earn RevPoints. Learn more about RevPoints from these FAQs in our Help Centre.

title: Joint account transfers
content_text:
## Receiving bank transfers to your Joint account
To receive a bank transfer to your Joint account, you'll need to give the sender your Joint account details. To view your details:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select your Joint account
- Tap 'More' → 'Details'
You can also share your account details with your employer to receive your salary to your Joint account.

## Send a bank transfer
To transfer money and schedule payments in-app:
- Go to 'Payments' on the bottom menu
- Choose the recipient, the amount from your Joint account balance, and the frequency you'd like to send it
- Review the payment and continue 

## Transfers to other Revolut customers
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select your Joint account
- Tap 'More' → 'Send'
- Choose the recipient and the amount you'd like to send
On the recipient's end, they'll see that the transaction was sent from your personal account instead of the Joint account. This is only because your Joint account doesn’t have a username, and the amount will still be taken from your Joint account.

title: Order a Joint account card
content_text:
## How to order a new Joint account card
In the Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap the card iconhttps://app.revolut.com/cards/overviewrevolut://app/cards in the top right corner
- Tap 'Add new'
- Choose 'Joint' at the top
- Tap 'Physical card' or 'Virtual card'
- Swipe between cards to choose the card type and design
- Follow the prompts to complete your order
Each card type has a fixed card brand, which can't be changed. Learn more about choosing a card brand in this FAQ/help/cards/card-order/can-i-choose-between-visa-and-mastercard.

## Card fees
You won't be charged an extra card fee for the first Joint card, even if you've already ordered a card on your personal account. You'll only be charged a delivery fee, unless you’re a Premium, Metal, or Ultra customer.
- Standard plan: 1 Joint account card at no cost
- Plus plan: 2 Joint account cards at no cost
- Premium plan: 2 Joint account cards at no cost
- Metal plan: 2 Joint account cards at no cost (1 Metal and 1 Premium/Plus/Standard) 
- Ultra plan: 2 Joint account cards at no cost (1 Ultra and 1 Premium/Plus/Standard) 
However, the final cost of your card depends on the card type, customisation, and delivery. We'll always show you any applicable fees before you complete your order.

## Limits
The card order limit for a Joint account is separate from your personal account limit. You can have up to 6 active physical cards for your personal account and an additional 6 active physical cards for your Joint account.
- Joint account holders can create up to 4 virtual cards every 30 days in total, per account
- Each account holder needs to order their cards separately. You can only view your own Joint account card in the Cards sectionhttps://app.revolut.com/cards/overviewrevolut://app/cards

## Delivery
- Cards for Standard and Plus customers get standard delivery, which can take between 8 to 15 business days (unless you pay to upgrade to priority delivery)
- The first Premium, Metal, and Ultra card orders get express tracked delivery for no charge
- Each card can be sent to a different address
If you’re having problems with card delivery, read this FAQ/help/cards/card-order/i-have-not-received-my-card-when-will-my-card-be-delivered.

title: Getting started with Joint Savings
content_text:
To open a Joint Savings account, you need to open a Joint account.  
Revolut savings accounts are available in GBP for Joint accounts, and they're free to open and manage.

## How to access a Joint Savings account
In the Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Tap 'Add new' → 'Joint' → 'Savings'
- Follow the prompts to set up your account
For more information Joint Savings, and Savings accounts, read these Savings FAQshttps://help.revolut.com/help/app-features/savings-vaults/?geo-redirect=true.

title: What happens if my joint account balance goes negative?
content_text:
## Reasons for a negative balance in your joint account
- An authorisation payment amount was less than the final amount of the transaction
- You incur fees for Revolut services 
- A card payment has been delayed
Once your balance becomes negative, we'll notify you in-app. You’ll have 7 business days to add money.

## What happens next?
We’ll try to correct the balance automatically by:
- Taking funds from your personal account
- Withdrawing funds from your Pockets 
- Taking the equivalent value from money you hold in another currency account
- Taking the amount you owe from your stored card
We may take these steps for any of the account holders. We'll let you know when the recovery is successful. We'll never use the money in your joint account to offset an amount owed to us on your personal account. Read our Joint Accounts T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/joint-accounts/?geo-redirect=true to learn more.

title: Revolut closed my joint account
content_text:
## Conditions for closing your joint account
- You don’t have an active personal account with Revolut
- You haven’t passed our identity verification checks
- You don’t live in the same country as the other account holder and don’t belong to the same Revolut entity
- You’re a co-holder of another Revolut joint account
- You have a pending invite for another Revolut joint account
Read our Joint Accounts T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/joint-accounts/?geo-redirect=true to learn more.

title: Difficulty logging in
content_text:
## Log in with your phone number
To log in, you must use the phone number associated with your Revolut account. If you've changed your phone number, you'll need to log in with your old number first — or use your email associated with your Revolut account — before you can update your details and use your new number. 
For guidance on updating your phone number, read this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/how-do-i-change-my-phone-number.
You can only change your passcode during or after logging in on a mobile device. For further guidance, visit this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/log-in-issues/i-forgot-my-passcode.

## Log in with your email
Make sure you can access the verification email on the same device that you're trying to log in with. For advice on how to update or verify your email, see this article/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/how-do-i-update-my-email-address.
If you're not receiving the verification code:
- Check your spam, junk, or unknown folders in your email
- Make sure your phone settings allow SMS and app notifications
- Tap 'Resend code' and select a different verification method if needed

## Difficulty with selfie authentication
When opening a Revolut account, logging in on a new device, or recovering your account, you may need to provide a selfie photo or video for verification. Ensure your selfie is clear and follows the instructions in this guide/help/sign-up/how-do-i-upload-a-selfie for it to be accepted.

## General tips
- Always use the phone number linked to your Revolut account when attempting to log in
- Make sure you have stable internet network connection
- Update your Revolut app to the latest version
- Update your phone's operating system
- Check the Revolut Status Pagehttps://www.revolut.com/system-status/?geo-redirect=true for outages or planned maintenance
If you or someone you know is having trouble logging in or accessing the in-app chat, Revolut Support can also be reached via email at support@revolut.com.

title: Change passcode
content_text:
## Forgot your passcode?
In the Revolut mobile app:
- On the login screen, enter your phone number
- Tap 'Forgot your passcode?'
- You may be asked to enter a one-time passcode sent to your device, or take a selfie or a picture of your ID

## You're already logged in
In the Revolut mobile app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and 'Change passcode'
- Follow the prompts to verify your identity with a selfie

## More information
To enhance your safety and security, we've introduced a 6-digit passcode. This feature adds an extra layer of protection to your account, making sure your personal and financial information remains secure.
If you're facing issues signing in with face ID or biometrics (fingerprint), go to this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/log-in-issues/sign-in-with-face-id-or-fingerprint in our Help Centre for troubleshooting steps.
If during the passcode change, you were asked to verify your identity with a selfie, you can visit this FAQ/help/sign-up/how-do-i-upload-a-selfie for extra help.

title: I lost access to my passkey
content_text:
If you lose access to your passkey, you can sign into Revolut with your passcode and 2FA (two-factor authentication). Accessing and recovering your passkey is done within your Apple, Google, or Microsoft cloud accounts, so be sure to keep the account secure.

## Revoke a passkey
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Account'
- Tap 'Passkeys'
- Select the 'Passkey' from the list of passkeys
- Press the 'Revoke' button

title: Duplicate account
content_text:
You can only have one personal and one Business account, as outlined in our T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/terms/?geo-redirect=true.
It's not possible to have two accounts, even if they're in two different countries. If you're moving countries, see this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/how-do-i-change-my-country-of-residence.
If you have a Revolut <18 account, you can open a personal account once you turn 18. Your parent or guardian must close your <18 account first — visit this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/revolut-junior/18-account-management to learn how.

## If you have access to both accounts:
- Log in to the account you wish to close on our mobile app
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account'
- Scroll down and choose 'Close account'
- Once the duplicate account is closed, your other account should function properly, and you can change the phone number or email if needed

## If you only have access to one account:
- Log in on our mobile app
- Contact Revolut Support via the in-app chat
- Once the other account is closed, you'll be able to switch your current account to the desired phone number and/or email

## If you can't log in at all:
- Open the Revolut app on your mobile device
- Dismiss your old phone number login if you're prompted
- Tap 'Log in'
- Tap 'Lost access to my phone number'
- Follow the prompts — you may be asked for a one-time passcode, to take a selfie, or to take a picture of an ID

title: Log in with a new phone number
content_text:
## Log in using your old number or email
In the Revolut mobile app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Account'
- Tap Personal details
- Tap your phone number to change
- Enter your new number and verify with a one-time passcode

## If you can't log into the app
- Open the Revolut app on your mobile device
- Dismiss your old phone number login if you’re prompted
- Tap 'Log in' and 'Lost access to my phone number'
- Enter your old phone number, and follow the prompts — you may be asked for a one-time passcode, to take a selfie, or to take a picture of an ID

title: Lost or stolen device
content_text:
If your device was lost, stolen, or may be at risk, follow the below steps where possible to help secure your account.

## If you don't have access to your account
- Tap this linkhttps://app.revolut.com/lost-device to report a lost device
- Verify your identity with a selfie. You'll need a mobile device to complete this step
- Follow the on-screen instructions to log out from all linked devices, freeze your cards temporarily, and change your passcode

## If you still have access to your account
- Open the Revolut mobile app
- From the home screen, tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Security'
- Tap 'Lost device'
- Follow the onscreen instructions to log out from all linked devices, freeze your cards temporarily, and change your passcode
You can also complete the steps in the Revolut web app:
- Sign in to app.revolut.comhttps://app.revolut.com
- Click 'Security' in the menu on the left 
- Click 'Lost device'
- Follow the on-screen instructions to log out from all linked devices, freeze your cards temporarily, and change your passcode

## Need more help?
If you're unable to follow any of these steps, email us at support@revolut.com.

title: Sign in with face ID or fingerprint
content_text:
To enhance the security of your Revolut account, you can enable face ID (iOS only) or biometrics (fingerprint scanning) for unlocking the app and authorising payments. 

## Enabling face ID or biometrics
To enable either of these options from the Revolut mobile app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Security' and 'Sign-in & Passcode'
- Choose the authentication methods you want to enable and follow the in-app steps to finish setting them up

## Face ID or biometrics isn't working
If either of these methods aren't working properly, here's a few things you can try:
