- Check if face ID (iOS only) or biometrics is enabled for the Revolut app in your device's settings
- If your device is new, you may only be prompted to activate face ID (iOS only) or biometrics in-app after you've already logged in a few times
- Make sure you have the latest version of the Revolut app installed on your device

title: What are passkeys?
content_text:
Passkeys were collaboratively developed by major tech companies, including Apple, Google, Microsoft, and the Fido Alliance, with the aim of enhancing the security and accessibility of online accounts. Passkeys generate a unique code on your device, as a secure alternative to traditional passwords.
In contrast to passwords or passcodes, which may be susceptible to being forgotten, guessed, or stolen, passkeys are locally generated and exclusive to your device. They’re not shared or stored on external servers. Passkeys can be conveniently stored in various locations, including:
- Your browser (e.g. Chrome)
- Apple, Google, or Microsoft devices
- Password Manager
- iCloud, Google, or Microsoft cloud services

## What are the advantages of using passkeys?
Passkeys provide robust security by resisting common online threats such as password/passcode breaches, password/passcode enumeration, and phishing attacks.
You can sign in with a single click or tap, and completion of your device's unlock method, such as a biometric scan, PIN, or password/passcode. Passkeys can also be synchronised with your Apple, Google, or Microsoft cloud accounts, for use across all of your devices.
If you lose access to your passkey, you can sign into your Revolut account with your passcode and 2FA (two-factor authentication). Accessing and recovering your passkey happens securely within your Apple, Google, or Microsoft cloud account. 

## Revoke a passkey
In the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and 'Passkeys'
- Select the passkey from the list
- Tap 'Revoke'

title: Download your account confirmation
content_text:
## Getting your document
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Documents & statements'
- Choose 'Personal'
- Tap 'Account confirmation'

## This document includes:
- Account holder details (name, date of birth, email address, address)
- Account status
- Opening date
- Wallet reference
- Bank identifier code (BIC) and sort code
- International bank account number (IBAN) and account numbers for all relevant accounts
We don't issue physical copies of documents or provide stamps on requested documents — all statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated.

title: Download an account statement for a specific currency
content_text:
## Get a currency statement in-app
Statements for any of your currency accounts contain the following details:
- Account holder details (name and address)
- Local and international details of your Bank Identifier Code (BIC) and International Bank Account Number (IBAN)
- Balance summary
- Pending, completed, and reverted transactions
- Personal and Group Pocket transactions

## View or download a currency account statement
In the Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts' and select the desired currency
- Tap 'More (...)' and select Statement
- Select the timeframe, choose a document type (PDF or Excel), and tap 'Generate'
We don’t issue hard-copy documents or provide stamps on requested documents — all statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated.

title: How to download a card confirmation document
content_text:
You can get a card confirmation document directly in-app. This document contains the following information:
- Details of all your Revolut cards
- Card delivery addresses
- Expiration dates
- Cardholder’s personal details (name, date of birth, email, and address)
- Wallet reference
The card confirmation document confirms all your current and previous physical, virtual, and single-use cards.

## View or download the card confirmation document
In the Revolut mobile app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top left corner
- Select 'Documents & statements'
- Tap 'General'
- Select 'Card confirmation'
We don’t issue hard-copy documents or provide stamps on requested documents. All statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated. If you’re unable to download the document, contact Revolut Support.

title: Download a cryptocurrency statement
content_text:
## Cryptocurrency statements
If you're a Crypto customer, you can download a cryptocurrency statement in your Revolut app. This document contains the following information: 
- Account holder details (name and address)
- All your crypto tokens transactions

## Download your cryptocurrency statement
In the Revolut mobile app: 
- Go to 'Crypto' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'More'
- Select 'Documents'
- Select the type of document you want to generate, choose a timeframe, and tap 'Generate'
We don't issue hard-copy documents or provide stamps on requested documents. All statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated.

title: Documents for a closed account
content_text:
If your Revolut account has been closed, and you need to request a document related to that account — e.g. an account statement — you can contact Revolut Support for the document.
If you’re unable to log in using your app:
- Open the Revolut app on your mobile device
- Dismiss the phone number login if you’re prompted
- Tap 'Log in'
- Tap 'Lost access to my phone number'
- Follow the prompts — you may be asked for a one-time passcode, to take a selfie, or to take a picture of an ID

## If you're still able to log in
If you’re still able to log in using your app, you can download the document from the app directly:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Documents & statements'
- Choose a document and follow the instructions
You can learn more about the available account documents in these FAQs in our Help Centre.

title: Get a Pockets statement
content_text:
All your transactions and money held in Personal Pockets and Group Pockets are included in your main account statement.
You won't be able to generate a statement containing just your Personal Pockets transactions. Instead, you'll be able to generate an account statement which will include Personal Pocket transactions.

## Getting an account statement
To generate your account statement in the relevant currency:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap Accounts and select the currency account
- Tap '...' and select 'Statement'
- Choose the date range and file format (PDF or Excel)
- Tap 'Generate'
- To download it, tap the 'Export' icon in the top right corner

title: Download transaction or top-up statement
content_text:
## How to download the transaction statement
- Go to your transactions listhttps://app.revolut.com/transactionsrevolut://app/transaction-list
- Select the desired transaction
- Tap 'Download'
The document will appear on your screen when ready. Currently, we can only generate statements for transactions, and can't group specific transactions together under one document.
Alternatively, you can request a statement of all the transactions for a specific timeframe from the Statement section in-app. Check how to request a statement of all transactions for a specific time period per currency in this FAQ.

## Information included in statement
- Account holder details (name and address)
- Account details (International Bank Account Number — IBAN, and account number)
- Details of the transaction (date, description, and amount)
You can download a statement for each transaction separately for any card payment, top-up, transfer, or currency exchange.

## Statements for paid plan fees
It's not possible to download an invoice for a paid plan subscription. You can download a statement of transactions showing the paid plan fee that was paid, as a workaround. 
We don't issue hard-copy documents or provide stamps on requested documents. All statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated.

title: Download statement of fees
content_text:
## Get the statement
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Documents & statements'
- Choose 'Personal'
- Tap 'Statement of fees'
Statement of fees documents provide an overview of all the fees for services linked to your Revolut account during a specific period.

## Information within the statement of fees document
- Interest paid
- Currency conversion fees charged
- Transfer or trading fees¹
- Paid plan fees¹
- Number of card payments and associated fees
We don't issue hard-copy documents or provide stamps on requested documents — all statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated.
¹ For customers aged 18 or above only

## For 18+ customers only
You can check the fees that apply for each paid plan on our Fees pagehttps://www.revolut.com/legal/fees/?geo-redirect=true. If you have a Revolut Kids & Teens account, you'll receive a separate statement of fees for each account. For any refunded fees, check your monthly statements in-app.

title: How to download a subject access request document
content_text:
Subject access request documents contain the following information:
- Account holder details: name, date of birth, email, and address
- Your Revolut cards details: a masked primary account number (PAN) including the first 6 and last 4 digits, expiry date, and delivery address
- Your card top-up details: last 4 digits, expiry date, and billing address
- Device details linked to your Revolut account

## How to download a subject access request
- Tap your profile icon in the top left corner
- Select Documents & statements
- Choose 'General'
- Tap 'Subject access request'
We don’t issue hard-copy documents or provide stamps on requested documents — all statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated.

title: How can I download trading statements and reports?
content_text:
## Trading account statements contain:
- Account holder details (name and address)
- Account summary
- Portfolio breakdown
- Transactions

## Profit & Loss statements contain the following information:
- Account holder details (name and address)
- Account number
- Selected period
- Realised return
- Dividends summary

## To get the statement type described above:
- Go to 'Invest' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'More(…)' and select 'Documents'
- Choose 'Stocks' and select 'Account' or 'Profit & Loss' statement

## Costs & Charges reports contain the following information:
- Account holder details (name and address)
- Account value
- Account name
- Account number
- Cost and charges related to investment services
- Costs and charges related to financial instruments

## To get the Cost & Charges report:
- Go to 'Investhttps://app.revolut.com/hub/stocksrevolut://app/trading' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'More(...)' and select 'Documents''
- Choose 'Stocks' and select 'Cost & Charges Report'
We don’t issue hard copy documents nor provide stamps on requested documents; all statements and confirmation documents are electronically generated.

title: Why are my statement balance and in-app balance different?
content_text:
To check your balance, go to Accounts https://get.revolut.com/E528/?af_channel=website_direct&af_dp=revolut%3A%2F%2Fapp%2Fwallet&af_sub1=%7B%22conversion_page_url%22%3A%22https%3A%2F%2Fhelp.revolut.com%2Fhelp%2Fprofile-and-plan%2Fmanaging-my-account%2Fwhy-is-the-balance-on-my-statement-different-from-the-balance-shown-in-my-app%2F%22%2C%22cookie_consent%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22landing_page_url%22%3A%22https%3A%2F%2Fhelp.revolut.com%2Fhelp%2Fprofile-and-plan%2Fmanaging-my-account%2Fwhy-is-the-balance-on-my-statement-different-from-the-balance-shown-in-my-app%2F%22%2C%22qr_code%22%3Afalse%2C%22website_client_id%22%3A%22c51c857b-aac3-4169-9020-5a03cc2ba535%22%7D&af_web_dp=https%3A%2F%2Fapp.revolut.com%2Faccounts&deep_link_sub1=DEEPLINK&deep_link_value=revolut%3A%2F%2Fapp%2Fwallet&pid=websiteand choose the account you want to view the balance of.
If you think your balance isn't correct, make sure to update your app to the most recent version. Check your currency account statement to double-check your total balance across all currency accounts, and carefully review your transaction listhttps://get.revolut.com/E528/?af_channel=website_direct&af_dp=revolut%3A%2F%2Fapp%2Ftransaction-list&af_sub1=%7B%22conversion_page_url%22%3A%22https%3A%2F%2Fhelp.revolut.com%2Fhelp%2Fprofile-and-plan%2Fmanaging-my-account%2Fwhy-is-the-balance-on-my-statement-different-from-the-balance-shown-in-my-app%2F%22%2C%22cookie_consent%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22landing_page_url%22%3A%22https%3A%2F%2Fhelp.revolut.com%2Fhelp%2Fprofile-and-plan%2Fmanaging-my-account%2Fwhy-is-the-balance-on-my-statement-different-from-the-balance-shown-in-my-app%2F%22%2C%22qr_code%22%3Afalse%2C%22website_client_id%22%3A%22c51c857b-aac3-4169-9020-5a03cc2ba535%22%7D&af_web_dp=https%3A%2F%2Fapp.revolut.com%2Ftransactions&deep_link_sub1=DEEPLINK&deep_link_value=revolut%3A%2F%2Fapp%2Ftransaction-list&pid=website to make sure your balance is accurate.

## Download your currency account statement
- Go to ‘Home’ on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap ‘Accounts’ and select the desired currency
- Tap ‘More (...)’ and select ‘Statement’
- Select the timeframe, choose a document type (PDF or Excel), and tap ‘Generate’
The currency account statement reflects the closing balance (your available funds to spend plus pending transactions), while your app shows available funds only. Pending transactions are at the top of your currency account statement. For more information about pending transactions, read this FAQhttps://help.revolut.com/help/card-payments-withdrawals/cancel-or-revert-a-pending-payment/.

## Why is my in-app balance greyed out?
If your in-app balance is greyed out, your balance visibility has been disabled. You can easily reset this so your balance will be visible again. To find out how to do this, read this articlehttps://help.revolut.com/help/profile-and-plan/security-and-personal-data/why-is-my-balance-blurry.

title: What is the consolidated statement?
content_text:
The consolidated statement contains several Revolut products statements in one document. It contains information on all of your currency, savings, investing, and crypto accounts.
To generate your consolidated statement:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Documents & statements'
- Select 'Consolidated statement'

## How can I use my consolidated statement?
The consolidated statement is useful while filing your tax declaration. It contains all the tax information that you need about all of your Revolut products in one place.
You can also use the consolidated statement for visa applications, or other official submissions. You may need to customise the statement to match the specific requirements of your use case.

## How do I file my taxes with the consolidated statement?
The consolidated statement contains information that is generally required as a part of the tax declaration process in most countries. This information is organised by product to help you file your taxes.
Revolut doesn't provide tax advice. It is your responsibility to understand how to declare your tax information and complete any required tax payments.
If you have any general self-assessment enquiries, contact a tax adviser or your national tax authority.

## Problem with my consolidated statement
If your full name, address, or tax ID don't appear correctly, you'll need to update them in-app. To update these details, tap your profile icon in the top-left corner, select 'Account', and select  'Personal details'.
If ‌you can’t find specific metrics in the consolidated statement, you may need to download one of the Revolut product statements in CSV format. You can then filter and calculate the specific metric on your own.
If you believe that some of the transaction information in your consolidated statement is incorrect, check the filters and customizations that you have applied. If the problem persists, contact customer support.

title: Cancelling your scheduled plan downgrade
content_text:
## How can I cancel my scheduled plan downgrade?
If you’ve scheduled a plan downgrade, you can cancel it directly in the Revolut app by tapping this link and selecting 'Keep plan'. You can also do this manually in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Your plan'
- Tap 'Billing'
- If you have a scheduled downgrade, you’ll see an option to 'Keep plan'
We'll automatically refund any break fee you paid. If you previously received a refund for ending your plan early, that amount will be charged back, since you’re staying on the plan. Review the Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true for more information on break fees.

title: Downgrading your paid plan
content_text:
## How can I downgrade from my paid plan? 
Tap this link, select the plan you want to downgrade to, and complete the steps as prompted.
If you want to manually downgrade your plan in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Your plan'
- Tap 'See plans'
- Choose the plan you want to downgrade to and follow the prompts

## What happens after I downgrade?
After downgrading, your plan-specific card may still work but will lose its plan-specific benefits.
You can find more about applicable downgrade fees and refunds in the Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true, and in the downgrade fees FAQ.

title: Paid plan downgrade fees
content_text:
## What fees apply when you downgrade your paid plan?
Downgrade fees depend on when you downgrade, your plan, and whether you pay monthly or annually.

## If you downgrade within 14 days of buying your plan
- Your subscription ends immediately
- You’ll receive a full refund of your subscription
- Delivery and card fees may apply if you ordered a paid plan card
- Based on your plan type, we may charge you for used benefits like Lounges, eSIM, and Airport Fast Track

## If you downgrade after 14 days of buying your plan
If you pay monthly, you’ll be charged for the current month and can continue using your plan until the end of your current monthly billing cycle. Break fees apply as below:
- Ultra customers: If you downgrade between 14 days and 6 months, you’ll be charged 1 month of your plan fee
- All other paid plans: If you downgrade between 14 days and 10 months, you’ll be charged 2 months of your plan fee
If you pay annually, you won't receive a refund for your subscription. No break fee applies when you downgrade. You can continue using your plan until the end of your current annual billing period (one year from your start date).

## Before confirming your downgrade
Review the Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true and Personal Fees Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/fees/?geo-redirect=true for full details, including card and delivery fees applicable. If you joined through a promotion or free trial, additional terms may apply.

title: Changing your paid plan billing date
content_text:
## Can I change my paid plan billing date?
You can’t change your paid plan billing date. The only way to reset your billing date is to downgrade your plan and then upgrade again on your preferred date.
Before confirming your downgrade, review the Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true and learn more about the downgrade fees applicable to you.

title: Managing your paid plan billing
content_text:
To view and manage your billing details, you can tap this link directly on your phone. You can also manually check in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Your plan'
- Tap 'Billing' to view your plan type, billing amount, and next payment
If you’re on a monthly plan, tap 'Save on annual' to switch to annual billing. If you’d like to change your plan, tap 'See plan' to browse your options. Review the Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true for more.

title: Pay for your missed plan payment
content_text:
To settle a missed paid plan payment, simply top up your account with enough funds to cover your plan fees. We’ll automatically collect the outstanding plan fee once funds are available.
To locate the plan fees, go to your transaction history and look for 'Plan fees'. Tap the transaction to download an invoice for your fees from the transaction details. 
If you do not pay the subscription within 30 days of it being due, we may cancel your subscription and downgrade you to a Standard plan. Read our Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true for more details.

title: Your paid plan subscription end date
content_text:
## When does my paid plan subscription end?
Your paid plan doesn’t have a fixed end date. It renews automatically at the end of each billing cycle unless you cancel or downgrade it. Monthly plans are billed each month, while annual plans are billed once a year.
If you decide to downgrade your plan, review the Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true to learn more about any applicable fees or refunds.

title: Next payment date for your paid plan
content_text:
## When is the next payment date for my paid plan?
To view your billing details, you can tap this link directly on your phone. You can also:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Your plan'
- Select 'Billing' to view your next payment date, along with details of any scheduled changes to your plan
If you are on a monthly plan, your payments are due every month. If you are on an annual plan, your billing cycle is yearly. Learn more about your Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true.

title: Paid plan payment status
content_text:
## How do I check plan payment status and download my invoice?
To check your plan payment in your transaction history:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Locate the 'Plan fee' transaction
- Tap the transaction to view the details and download the invoice
To see when your next payment is due, tap this link, or tap 'Your plan' in your in-app profile, and 'Billing'.

title: Chess.com
content_text:
## Chess.com access
To access your Chess.com subscription (available to Metal and Ultra customers) in-app:
- From the home screen, tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Your plan'
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Chess.com' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
Once that's done, you'll be subscribed to either Platinum Premium Membership (Metal) or Diamond Premium Membership (Ultra).

## Subscription difficulty
If you're having issues with the promo code for Chess.com, contact customer support.
This benefit is available to Metal and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.
You can read more on our Plan Partnershipshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/plan-partnerships/?geo-redirect=true page.

title: ClassPass
content_text:
As a Metal customer, you get 10 ClassPass credits each rolling month, and Ultra customers get 20. This benefit provides worldwide access to top-rated gyms and fitness studios, gym credits, fitness classes, exclusive rates, in-app promos, and more.
This offer can’t be used in conjunction with any Corporate Wellness package.

## ClassPass access
To access your ClassPass subscription (available to Metal and Ultra customers) in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'ClassPass' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## Subscription difficulty
If you have any difficulty subscribing to ClassPass, we recommend visiting their websitehttps://classpass.com/contact or contacting their Customer Support team in the app. 
If you have an existing subscription, your additional ClassPass credits will be applied at the start of your next billing cycle.
This benefit is available to Metal and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to downgrade to any other plans at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.

title: Financial Times
content_text:
If you activate your benefit, you’ll be subscribed to Financial Times Standard Digital (Metal) or Financial Times Premium Digital subscription (Ultra), giving you access to:
- Global news and analysis
- Expert opinions
- Special features
- The FirstFT newsletter
- Videos and podcasts
- The FT Edit app
- 10 gift articles per month (20 for Ultra)
- Lex column (Ultra only)
- ePaper access (Ultra only)

## Financial Times access
To access your Financial Times subscription in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Financial Times' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## Subscription errors
If you're having any trouble subscribing to the Financial Times, we recommend visiting their websitehttps://aboutus.ft.com/contact-us or contacting their Customer Care team via email at help@ft.com.
If you have an existing personal subscription, you can cancel it and sign up for this benefit with Revolut. 
This benefit is available to Metal and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.

title: Freeletics
content_text:
If you activate the Freeletics benefit, you’ll be subscribed to the Training Coach plan.
This includes a digital personal trainer, which uses human-augmented AI to learn from 55 million users worldwide, and determine exactly which exercises and workouts best match your abilities and goals.
You’ll also get custom-created workout plans specifically tailored to you, and super-effective HIIT training.

## Freeletics access
To access your Freeletics subscription (available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers) in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Freeletics' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## Subscription difficulties
If you have any difficulty subscribing to Freeletics, we recommend visiting their websitehttps://help.freeletics.com/hc/en-us/requests/new or contacting their Customer Support team at support@freeletics.com email address.
If you have an existing subscription, you can deactivate it in the Freeletics app. If cancellation isn't possible, wait until your current subscription expires before unlocking this benefit with Revolut.
This benefit is available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your plan subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.

title: Headspace
content_text:
If you activate this benefit, you'll get access to Headspace Premium.
This benefit is available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your Revolut paid plan at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit. You can read more on our Plan Partnershipshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/plan-partnerships/?geo-redirect=true page.

## Headspace access
If you're an existing Headspace subscriber, you'll need to cancel your current subscription on the same platform you started it (this might be the Headspace website, the App Store, or the Google Play Store). You can find more information in the Headspace Help Centrehttps://help.headspace.com/hc/en-us/articles/115008364988-How-do-I-cancel-my-subscription-.
To access your Headspace subscription (available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers) in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Headspace' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## Subscription difficulties
If the promo code doesn't work, you can contact us via the in-app chat.
For any other issues subscribing to Headspace, contact Headspace's Customer Support team at teamsupport@headspace.com.
If your subscription has expired or been deactivated, you can start your new subscription through Revolut by following the steps above.

title: Headway
content_text:
## Headway access
To access your Headway subscription in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Headway' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
Once that's done, you'll be subscribed to Headway Premium, which offers unlimited access to book summaries, audio summaries, personalised recommendations, highlighting and note-taking features, offline access, and an ad-free experience. It's perfect for those who want to stay informed on the go.

## Subscription difficulty
If the activation link doesn't work, you can contact customer support. For any other issues subscribing to Headway, contact their Customer Support team at support@get-headway.com email address. You can also visit Headway's FAQ pagehttps://makeheadway.com/faq/ for more information.
If you're an existing Headway subscriber, you'll need to cancel your current subscription on the same platform you started it (this can be either the Headway website, the App Store, or the Google Play Store). You can learn more about cancellation on this pagehttps://headway.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/4408407992210-How-can-I-cancel-my-subscription.
Once your subscription is deactivated or expired, you can start your new subscription through Revolut.

title: MasterClass
content_text:
## MasterClass access
To access your MasterClass subscription (available to Metal and Ultra customers) in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down to your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'MasterClass' and follow the instructions to activate
Once that's done, you'll be subscribed to either MasterClass Limited Subscription (Metal) or MasterClass Full Subscription (Ultra).

## Existing subscribers
Whether you are a current or former MasterClass member, you can redeem your code to seamlessly extend your access. The additional year will automatically stack onto your existing subscription, with future codes provided to ensure your learning remains uninterrupted.

## Subscription difficulty
If you're having difficulty with the promo code for MasterClass, contact us via our in-app chat.
This benefit is available to Metal and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your plan subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.
You can read more on our Plan Partnerships pagehttps://www.revolut.com/legal/plan-partnerships/?geo-redirect=true.

title: NordVPN
content_text:
## NordVPN access
To access your NordVPN subscription (available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers) in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'NordVPN' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
- Your subscription will be renewed monthly as long as you stay on plan
Once that’s done, you’ll be subscribed to either NordVPN Standard (Premium), NordVPN Plus (Metal), or NordVPN Complete (Ultra). This includes a secure, high-speed VPN with malware protection, ad blocker, and more.

## Plan changes
If you move from Premium/Metal to Ultra, you will have to reactivate your NordVPN subscription.

## Subscription issues
If you have any issues subscribing to NordVPN, we recommend visiting their websitehttps://nordvpn.com/contact-us/. 
If you have an existing NordVPN subscription, your Revolut subscription will be added on top of your current one. This means that your existing subscription is paused, and you'll automatically continue on the Revolut’s issued NordVPN subscription for no additional fees.
This benefit is available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your Revolut paid plan at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this NordVPN benefit.

title: Perplexity
content_text:
## Perplexity access
The Perplexity subscription benefit is available to Premium (first-time Perplexity customers only), Metal, and Ultra customers. To access your complimentary Perplexity subscription in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Perplexity' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
Once that's done, you'll be subscribed to either a complimentary Perplexity Pro subscription for a maximum of 12 months (Premium) or a complimentary Perplexity Pro subscription for the entirety of your plan duration (Metal and Ultra).

## Subscription difficulty
If the promo code for Perplexity doesn't work, reach out to Revolut Support via our in-app chat.
If you decide to end your Revolut plan subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit. You can read more on our Plan Partnerships pagehttps://www.revolut.com/legal/plan-partnerships/?geo-redirect=true.

title: Picsart
content_text:
## Picsart access
To access your Picsart subscription (available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers) in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Picsart' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
Once that’s done, you’ll be subscribed to Picsart Pro, where you can unlock AI-powered tools to design, edit, draw, and share content anywhere. With a massive open-source content collection, you’ll have access to millions of photos, stickers, backgrounds, templates, and more.

## Subscription difficulty
If you have any difficulty subscribing to Picsart, we recommend visiting their websitehttps://support.picsart.com/hc/en-us. 
If you have an existing subscription, you can deactivate it in the Picsart app. Or once it expires, you can use this benefit with Revolut. 
This benefit is available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your plan subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.

title: How do I access a partner benefit?
content_text:
## Accessing partner benefits
You can access your partner benefits directly through the Revolut app. When necessary, you’ll be redirected to the partner’s website or app to complete the process. To access the partner benefits included in your plan, follow these steps:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Tap the partner whose benefit you’d like to use
- Read the instructions and the benefit description
- Tap the button at the bottom of the page and follow the instructions
These benefits come in various forms and may have different redemption rules and steps. Make sure to refer to the specific FAQ in our Help Centre for each one for detailed guidance.

title: Laundryheap
content_text:
## Laundryheap access
Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers can enjoy the Laundryheap+ subscription and a £10 monthly credit as one of their paid plan benefits. To access your Laundryheap+ subscription in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down to your benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Laundryheap' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
To make sure your credits are correctly applied, use the same email address to redeem your benefit as you use to sign up to or log in to the Laundryheap app.

## Location and credits eligibility
Laundryheap+ subscriptions and credits are valid only in your Revolut-registered location. Unused credits roll over for up to 3 months before expiring. Laundryheap services are available in:
- Birmingham
- Edinburgh
- London
- Manchester

## Subscription issues
If the activation link doesn't work, contact us via our 24/7 in-app chat. For any other questions about your Laundryheap subscription, contact Laundryheap via their in-app support chat or email help@laundryheap.com.

title: What happens to my partner benefits if I change my plan?
content_text:
## Redeeming after plan changes
Access to partner benefits depends on your current Revolut plan. If you upgrade or downgrade your plan, you may need to redeem a benefit again to regain access once your new plan is activated.
We work closely with our partners to minimise how often this is required. However, re-redemption may sometimes be necessary. 

## Downgrading implications
If you downgrade to a plan that doesn’t include a specific partner, or includes a lower-tier benefit, your access to that partner benefit (or tier) will be removed.
You can check which partner benefits are included with each plan in your country on this pagehttps://www.revolut.com/subscriptions-plans/?geo-redirect=true.

## Account ownership
Partner benefits are provided by third-party companies, so any account you create with them remains yours and won't be deleted.

title: What are partner benefits?
content_text:
## About partner benefits
Partner benefits are a curated selection of lifestyle, productivity, and entertainment benefits included with your Revolut paid plan at no additional cost. These benefits come in various forms ranging from full digital subscriptions and credits rolling each month to exclusive one-time vouchers. 
 Check your benefits in-app to see the full details of what's included.

## Check your eligibility
Because these benefits are provided through our specific partners, availability may change based on your plan tier and your country of residence. To explore the benefits currently included in your plan:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Your plan'
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'

title: Sleep Cycle
content_text:
You’ll be able to start your day feeling energised with Sleep Cycle’s intelligent alarm clock and sleep tracker, designed to:
- gently wake you up while you’re in your lightest sleep phase
- visualise your sleep trends through daily sleep graphs
- capture snoring, sleep talking, and other sounds affecting your sleep with patented sound technology

## Sleep Cycle access
To access your Sleep Cycle subscription (available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers) in-app: 
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Your plan'
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Sleep Cycle' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## Subscription issues
If you have any issues subscribing to Sleep Cycle, we recommend contacting their Customer Support team at support@sleepcycle.com. 
If you have an existing subscription, you can deactivate it in the Sleep Cycle app. Or once it expires, you can unlock this benefit with Revolut.
This benefit is available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your Revolut paid plan at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.

title: The Athletic
content_text:
## The Athletic access
To access your The Athletic subscription (available to Metal and Ultra customers) in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'The Athletic' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## What's included with a subscription to The Athletic?
- Unrivalled trusted coverage of the top Premier League clubs and major European teams
- Dedicated coverage of the major European leagues, including La Liga, Serie A, and the Bundesliga
- In-depth live match centre for real-time scores and stats
- Access to over 450 sports writers, including prominent figures in football such as Oli Kay, Danny Taylor, and David Ornstein
- A wide breadth of sports coverage beyond football, including the NFL, NBA, Formula One, and tennis
- Dedicated mobile apps available for iOS and Android platforms

## Subscription difficulty
If you're having difficulty with the promo code for The Athletic, contact The Athletic's support.
This benefit is available to Metal and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your plan subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.
You can read more on our Plan Partnershipshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/plan-partnerships/?geo-redirect=true page.

title: Tinder
content_text:
Take control over who sees you by choosing to only be seen by people you like. Explore unlimited Rewinds for as many second chances as you need, and match with people all over the world, wherever you are.
This benefit is available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.

## Tinder access
To access your Tinder subscription (available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers) in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Tinder' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
Once that's done, you'll be subscribed to either Tinder Plus (Premium) or Tinder Gold (Metal and Ultra). With Tinder Gold, you'll get all the benefits of Tinder Plus as well as access to Unlimited Likes, Boost, and 5 weekly Super Likes.

## Subscription difficulty
If you have any trouble subscribing to Tinder, we recommend visiting their websitehttps://www.help.tinder.com/hc/en-us/requests/new. Paid Plan T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans//?geo-redirect=true apply. 
If you have an existing subscription, you must first cancel it and wait for it to end before activating the Revolut benefit. For example, if you subscribed on day 1 and cancel on day 7, the subscription will not end until day 30. Do not activate the new subscription through Revolut until day 31.
If you deleted your Tinder account after redeeming the code, you'll need to contact Tinder support to reactivate it. If you continue to experience trouble, contact us via the in-app chat.

title: Turo rewards
content_text:
## Getting the reward
To find your Turo reward (available to Ultra customers) in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top left corner
- Select 'Your plan'
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits, tap 'See all'
- Select 'Turo' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## Turo reward terms
- The promo code isn't applied to protection plan costs, taxes, or other fees
- Valid for UK bookings only
- Ultra cardholders can redeem a maximum of one promo code per month
- If the booking expires, is declined, or cancelled, the promo code will be voided

## If the reward doesn't work
If the activation link doesn't work, you need to contact Revolut Support. For any other issues with your reward, refer to Turo's live support chat and their FAQs on this pagehttps://help.turo.com/.
For the best in-app experience, keep both the Turo app and your device's operating system up-to-date.
If you decide to end your Ultra plan at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit. You can read more on our Plan Partnershipshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/plan-partnerships/?geo-redirect=true page.

title: Uber One
content_text:
To access Uber One using your Premium, Metal, or Ultra subscription, follow these steps in the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'Uber One' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit
After activation, Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers will be subscribed to Uber One.

## Eligibility
This benefit is available to Premium, Metal, and Ultra customers in selected countries only.
Premium customers are ineligible for the Uber One benefit if they have an active Uber One subscription, or have had one in the past. Metal and Ultra customers are eligible for the Uber One benefit regardless of whether they currently have an Uber One subscription or had one in the past.

## Country restrictions
- Your Uber One account country will match the country of your Revolut account, and benefits are valid for use in that country only
- You can only activate your Uber One benefit while you are physically present in the country associated with your Revolut account

## Subscription help
Make sure to check your eligibility before attempting to activate Uber One.
If you decide to end your Revolut plan subscription at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit. You can read more on our Plan Partnershipshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/plan-partnerships/?geo-redirect=true page.

title: WeWork
content_text:
WeWork offers a beautifully designed workspace with high-speed internet and unlimited coffee and tea. You can redeem your pass/passes at any of WeWork's locations that offer 'On Demand'.
On Demand is currently active in Australia, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Czech Republic, France, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, Netherlands, Poland, Singapore, Spain, United Kingdom, and the United States. You can check the WeWork website or app for an updated list.

## WeWork access
To access your WeWork subscription (available to Metal and Ultra customers) in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top left corner
- Select Your plan
- Scroll down until you see your plan's benefits and tap 'See all'
- Select 'WeWork' and follow the instructions to activate this benefit

## What's included with this benefit?
Once you have accessed your WeWork subscription, you get:
- For Metal customers: 1 code per calendar month, valid for a single visit to WeWork spaces that month
- For Ultra customers: 1 code per calendar month, valid for up to 3 visits to WeWork spaces that month
Codes reset on the first day of each calendar month, regardless of your Revolut plan start date. You can use your code for a booking only within the current month. 

## Subscription issues
If you're having trouble subscribing to WeWork, contact their customer support team through the WeWork app.
Existing subscribers need to use the code at checkout without resubscribing through Revolut.
This benefit is available to Metal and Ultra customers in selected countries only. If you decide to end your Revolut paid plan at any time, you'll automatically lose access to this benefit.

title: Discounts for loyal customers
content_text:
## Can I get a renewal discount as a loyal paid plan customer?
We don’t offer loyalty-based discounts on paid plan renewal fees. If you’re eligible for any promotions or special offers, you’ll be notified directly in the app or by email.

title: Promotional and free trials
content_text:
## How to activate promotions and free trials
Visit your notification centre or the 'Your plan' page. If an offer we’ve communicated to you is still valid, you can activate it.

## Enrolment into the plan
If you don't downgrade before the promotion period, trial period, or 14-day cooling off period ends (whichever is later), you'll automatically be subscribed to a monthly plan.
Monthly billing will apply, and if you choose to downgrade to Standard, break feeshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true  may apply depending on when you downgrade.
For more information, visit our Promotion T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/other-promotions/?geo-redirect=true.

## How to change or cancel the plan in-app
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Your plan' 
- Tap 'Billing' and select 'Change plan'
- Choose your desired plan and follow the prompts to complete your plan change

## Fees for downgrading
If you downgrade before the promotion, trial period, or 14-day cooling off period ends (whichever is later), the plan change will be immediate and you'll be refunded the full amount paid, minus:
- the applicable fee if you ordered a plan-specific card
- the applicable fee if you used any plan benefits
If the plan fee caused your balance to be negative, it should be automatically covered by the plan fee refund when you downgrade. For fee details, refer to our paid plan T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true.

title: Order a paid plan card
content_text:
## How can I order or re-order a paid plan card?
You can order or re-order a paid plan card directly in the Revolut app. To do so:
- Tap the 'Cards' icon in the top-right corner of your home screen, and then tap 'Add new'
- Select your preferred card and follow the steps to complete the order
Before ordering a new card, review the Paid Plan Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true and Personal Fees Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/fees/?geo-redirect=true to check any applicable card or delivery fees.

title: Metal plan
content_text:
All paid plans benefit from priority customer support, access to everyday protection insurance, and an exclusive card for that plan.
You can compare all plans and benefits side-by-side on this pagehttps://www.revolut.com/our-pricing-plans/?geo-redirect=true.

## Plan cost
The Metal plan costs £14.99 per month or £140 per year.

## Plan benefits
- Withdraw up to £800 per month with no additional fees
- Exchange unlimited amounts of money with no additional fees, including on weekends
- Earn up to 3.51% AER (variable) interest on your savings
- Save 40% on international transfer fees
- Subscriptions with selected partners
- Cover for winter sport, travel, car hire, and personal liability
- Earn RevPoints on everyday card purchases
Insurance policy T&Cs (incl. exclusions) apply. Go to our Metal pagehttps://www.revolut.com/metal/?geo-redirect=true to learn more. All plans are subject to change and our T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true. If you need to switch your plan, you can use this link.

title: Can I reopen my closed account?
content_text:
## Account reactivation
In most cases, it's not possible to re-open a closed Revolut account.
If you closed your account and wish to use Revolut again, we recommend creating a new account, as this is often faster and simpler than requesting reactivation. If you still prefer to explore reactivation, please note that it's only available in very limited cases.
Use the in-app chat to contact customer support. They’ll let you know if reactivation is an option.

## Reusing your account details
If your previous account was closed or terminated, you can reuse the same phone number and email address when creating a new account.

## Blocks, restrictions, and accounts closed by Revolut
For closed and restricted accounts, you can get additional help in this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/security-and-personal-data/my-account-is-locked/why-is-my-account-locked.

title: Switching languages in the app
content_text:
The Revolut app is set to the same language as your device by default, but you can change it by following the steps below.

## On Android mobile devices
You'll need to change the language your device is set to. The Revolut app should then update to the same language.
To do this, go to your device's settings and search 'Language'.
If your Revolut app doesn't change language, quit the app and open it again.

## On Apple mobile devices
To change the language for the Revolut app:
- Go to your device’s settings
- In the 'Apps' section, select the Revolut app
- Select 'Language' and choose your preferred language
If your Revolut app doesn't change language, quit the app and open it again.

## Supported languages
Currently, the Revolut app can be used in the following languages: 
Brazilian Portuguese, Bulgarian, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, French, German, Greek, Hungarian, Italian, Japanese, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Slovakian, Spanish, Swedish, Ukrainian
After you change your language settings, it may take up to 2 hours for in–app documents to reflect your updated language choice.

title: How do I manage notifications from Revolut?
content_text:
## Marketing and promotion notifications
To activate or deactivate marketing and promotion notifications in the Revolut app: 
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Scroll down and select 'Notification settings'
- Enable or disable the applicable toggles based on your preferences 

## Main app notifications
To manage other notifications, like notification sounds, transfers, and transactions, you’ll need to change the notification settings for the Revolut app in your mobile device's settings. Simply go to your device's settings and tap Revolut in your app list. 
We recommend keeping Revolut notifications on, as they give you important information about your account, transfers, and spending. This helps you quickly find transactions and report any suspicious activity.

title: Trouble with mobile verification code
content_text:
## Troubleshooting tips
- Ensure your network signal is strong enough. You can refresh it by switching airplane mode on and then off again
- Check if there are any SMS filtering settings or applications on your phone
- Ensure that your phone inbox isn't full
- Swap the SIM to another phone in case the issue is device related
The option to link cards to Google Pay or Apple Pay, credit applications, or external transfer submissions aren't always available. If they're not available to you, you may not receive a verification code.

## Use email instead
If you're unable to receive SMS messages, you can opt to receive emails instead. If you let the time run out at the 'Resend code' timer, select 'Resend code' and choose 'Email verification method'.
- Tap your profile icon in the top left corner
- Select 'Account'
- Choose 'Personal details' and tap your email
- Type in your preferred email address and tap 'Verify'
- Open the verification email on the same device and tap the confirmation link
- Check your spam folder in case you can't find it in your inbox
For more information on how to confirm your email address, read this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/how-do-i-update-my-email-address. If you're still having trouble receiving an SMS message, contact our support team through the in-app chat.

title: Change my address
content_text:
## Your address is within the UK
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and Personal details
- Tap 'Residential address' to edit it
Address changes to and from the territories listed below are considered as address changes within the same country, and you won't be required to close your account:
- Guernsey
- Isle of Man
- British Indian Ocean Territory
- Jersey

## Your address is not within the UK
If you're moving to a different country, you'll need to close your Revolut account to be able to open a new one in another supported country/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/verifying-identity/what-countries-are-supported.
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and Close account
- Follow the prompts required for the closure, including removing all balances and waiting for pending transactions to be completed
You can't have multiple accounts or keep your main account if you're no longer a resident in the country it was opened in. If your relocation is temporary, your account will still be usable. Learn more about account closure requirements in this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/closing-account.

## Transferring your funds if you need to close the account
You can't transfer funds between your own Revolut accounts. Transfer the balance to an external account or to another Revolut customer before closing your account.

title: Change my date of birth
content_text:
## Your account isn't verified yet
In the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and Personal details
- Enter your date of birth and any other required details, or submit documents

## Your account is already verified
If your date of birth is greyed out on the 'Edit profile' screen, you need to contact us via our in-app chat.

title: Change my name
content_text:
If your name has changed, or the name linked to your Revolut account doesn't match your legal name, you'll need to provide a government-issued ID. Approval usually takes 15 to 45 minutes, but may take longer.
If you're going through verification, you won't be able to update your name until after verification is completed. Wait until the verification process is complete and try again.

## How to change your name
In the Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and 'Personal details'
- Tap your name to edit it and follow the instructions

title: Change my phone number
content_text:
## Log in using your old number or email
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Account'
- Tap 'Personal details'
- Tap on your phone number to change it
- Enter your new number and verify with a one-time passcode 

## If you can't log into the app
- Open the Revolut app on your mobile device
- Dismiss your old phone number login if you're prompted
- Tap 'Log in'
- Tap 'Lost access to my phone number'
- Follow the prompts — you may be asked for a one-time passcode, to take a selfie, or to take a picture of your ID

title: Change or verify email address
content_text:
## How to change or verify your email
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap 'Account'
- Tap 'Personal details'
- Tap on your email
- Type in your preferred email address and tap 'Verify'
- Open the verification email on the same device and tap the confirmation link

## If you're having difficulty verifying your email
- Check other email folders, including spam, junk, offers, or promotions
- Try opening your email in your mobile browser, if you previously used an email app
- Push and hold on the 'Verify' button in the email, press copy, and then paste the copied link into your mobile browser
- Your email can only be associated with one personal Revolut account at a time — read our FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/log-in-issues/i-think-i-have-a-duplicate-account on duplicate accounts if you think you have a second account

title: Change my Revtag
content_text:
## How to update your Revtag
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Account' and 'Personal details'
- Tap your Revtag to change it
Previous Revtags will become inactive and won’t be able to be used by other customers. You can switch back to an old Revtag at any time. 

## Restrictions on Revtag changes
- You can only change your Revtag twice, excluding switching back to an old Revtag
- Your Revtag must be unique and can't be taken by another customer
- Your Revtag must be between 3–16 characters
- Your Revtag can only contain numbers 0–9 and letters A to Z in the English alphabet
A Revtag can only be reused if it was previously used on the same account. It cannot be reused across different accounts (e.g. from an old closed account to a new one).

title: Update my tax information
content_text:
As a regulated financial institution, we're required to collect your tax residence information. Depending on your country, we may require a tax identification number (TIN) to confirm your tax status. To check what your country's TIN is, visit this FAQ/help/sign-up/what-is-a-tin-tax-identification-number.
You're typically considered a tax resident where you live or reside for 6 months of the year. Most people live at a single tax address. If you have 2 or more fixed addresses in different countries, then you may be considered a tax resident in multiple jurisdictions.
Your account may be limited if you fail to provide the required tax residence information.

## How to update my tax residences
All tax residences must be declared. To find the correct format of the tax identification number (TIN) you need to submit, you can check the OECD websitehttps://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/tax-identification-numbers/. To update your tax residencies in-app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap ’Account’
- Tap ‘Personal details’
- Tap ‘Tax residencies’
- Tap ‘Add’ to add a new country, or the pencil icon to update your TIN
- For a country that you no longer pay taxes in, tap the pencil icon next to that country and tap ‘Delete tax residence’

## I don't have the required TIN
If you don't have a TIN because you're a student, intern, temporary resident, diplomatic staff or a relative of diplomatic staff, you may be eligible for an exemption:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Tap ’Account’
- Tap ‘Personal details’
- Tap ‘Tax residencies’
- Tap the pencil icon next to the country
- If eligible, you'll see ‘I can’t provide it now’
- You can then select the relevant reason for not having a TIN
If you don't see the ‘I can’t provide it now’ option, you'll have to provide your TIN.

## Why does Revolut need my tax residency and TIN?
Under the Common Reporting Standard (CRShttps://web-archive.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/common-reporting-standard/index.htm) and the Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCAhttps://www.irs.gov/businesses/corporations/foreign-account-tax-compliance-act-fatca), we need to collect certain tax-related information to identify whether an account holder qualifies as a reportable individual.
CRS was developed by the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD). It requires participating jurisdictions to obtain information from their financial institutions and exchange that information with other jurisdictions annually. For more details on CRS, visit the OECD websitehttps://web-archive.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/common-reporting-standard/index.htm.
FATCA is a United States legislation that requires foreign financial institutions to obtain information about the foreign financial assets held by US citizens. For more details on FATCA, visit the IRS websitehttps://www.irs.gov/businesses/corporations/foreign-account-tax-compliance-act-fatca.

title: Source of funds
content_text:
If we need additional information about your wealth or income, you'll receive an email, a push notification, and see a banner on your in-app 'Home' screen. We'll also let you know if there’s a due date for submitting these details.
Providing this information will ensure your account remains functional and helps combat financial crime.
While you aren't obliged to provide these documents, we'll restrict or close your account as per our T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/terms/?geo-redirect=true if we do not receive them.

## Supported documents
Supported documents depend on your source of ‌funds (investment income, sale of property, etc.). You can check which documents are accepted for your particular case in this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/verifying-identity/documents-for-the-source-of-funds-verification.

## Your details
- The name on the document must match the name on your Revolut account
- Make sure you're providing accurate and up-to-date information about your income and wealth

## Document upload
- Update your app to the latest version
- Make sure all documents are clear and readable. Documents that are covered up or cut out of the frame won't be accepted
- Upload PDFs or photos of physical documents. Screenshots aren't accepted

title: Upgrade my plan
content_text:
To upgrade your plan in the main Revolut app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Your plan'
- Tap 'See plans'
- Choose your desired plan and follow the prompts to complete your plan change
If you upgrade your plan, the change will be immediate and your billing date will be updated accordingly. If you’d like to opt for annual billing, you can change this after you sign up for the monthly plan. Paid Plan T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/paid-plans/?geo-redirect=true apply.

title: Accepted proof of address documents
content_text:
We accept a variety of documents to verify your residential address. All documents must meet the criteria outlined in this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/verifying-identity/i-need-to-verify-my-address in our Help Centre.

## Supported bank documents
- Bank statements that include actual bank transactions (including online financial institutions, like Monzo, and Starling)
- Credit card statements
- Any other official correspondence from a bank
- Revolut account statements are not accepted

## Supported residential documents
- Utility bills related to your property, such as electricity, water, gas, council tax, landline telephone, broadband, and internet bills. Mobile service bills (for example, a Vodafone bill) are not accepted
- House purchase agreement or deed
- Lease or rental agreement. These must be signed by both the landlord and tenant

## Supported government documents
- Any letter or notification from the government or recognised public authorities or servants
- Receipts of pension benefits
- Receipts of unemployment benefits
- Receipts of housing benefits

## Other accepted documents
- Letter from a hospital or general practitioner (GP) that includes your address
- ID, passport, driving licence, or residence permit documents that includes your address

title: Documents for the source of funds verification
content_text:
Accepted documents can vary depending on your source of income.

## Employment and freelance income
- Tax return statement or tax declaration
- Recent payslip(s) or pension slip(s) issued within the last 12 months
- Bank transfer confirming the receipt of income, clearly showing the employer's name in the 'Sender' or 'Description' field
- Letter from employer confirming salary
- Work contract, dated and signed by employer and employee, stating the duration of employment, the salary and/or additional benefits
- Invoices dated within the last 12 months, clearly showing your full name, address, and VAT number
- Contracts for services provided as a freelancer, dated and signed by both parties, stating the duration of the agreement, payment terms and/or additional benefits

## Income from investments and financial assets
- Dividends statement, certificate, or voucher clearly showing the amount and your position (you must be a director or shareholder)
- Account statement reflecting credit of amount from a particular source
- Statement from investment manager or provider
- Investment certificate or portfolio confirming the sale of shares and withdrawal of money
- Tax declaration

## Property sale or inheritance
- Signed letter from the solicitor
- Copy of contract of sale
- Tax declaration
- Real estate title deed, showing the change of ownership from the previous owner to the new owner, the amount, and the date
- Signed letter from the estate agent
- Grant of probate (with a copy of the will), including the value of the estate
- Account statement showing the receipt of the funds and main account balance
In the case of inheritance, both of the last 2 documents must be provided.

## Other source of funds types
Legal settlement: must provide a court order, written confirmation of settlement signed by the advocate or solicitor, and an account statement clearly showing the receipt of funds and main account balance.
Gifts: proof of transfer from the donor is required, as well as the full name of the donor and relationship.
Gaming wins: either a statement of deposit, win, or withdrawal from the gambling platform or evidence of wins and withdrawals from any platforms or organised tournaments. Also provide a corresponding account statement clearly showing the receipt of funds and main account balance.

title: Verify my identity
content_text:
## Where do I submit my proof of identity?
If we need you to provide proof of identity, you'll get an email, push notification, and a banner on your Home screen in-app. To submit, simply tap any notification we send you about your identity checks.
If you don't see any prompt for this information in-app, check your emails as we may already have everything we need. If you're having difficulty with identity verification, visit this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/verifying-identity/im-unable-to-verify-my-identity in our Help Centre.

## How long do I have to submit my proof of identity?
We’ll give you a deadline to send the new document by. Your account will keep working until this deadline, but afterwards it may be temporarily restricted until you can provide valid proof of identity.

## Guidelines
- The types of document we accept are listed on the submission screen in-app
- Your documents must be up-to-date
- The name on your document must match the name on your Revolut account
- If your nationality is different from your current residential address, you may be asked for proof of address/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/verifying-identity/i-need-to-verify-my-address

## Document upload tips
- Update your Revolut app to the latest version
- Make sure your document is clear and easy to read
- Capture the entire document. Don't fold, crop, or exclude any part of it
- Upload a photo of the original, physical document
- We can't accept pictures of copies, scans, or device screens

title: How do I provide proof of address?
content_text:
If we need you to provide proof of address, you'll receive an email, push notification, and see a banner on your in-app home screenhttps://app.revolut.com/accountsrevolut://app/wallet. Simply follow the instructions to upload your document.
Verification typically takes less than 1 hour, but it can take up to 1 business day for some cases.

## Supported document and criteria
You'll need to upload a PDF, or a photo of a physical document. Screenshots are not accepted. Supported documents will be listed on the submission screen.
- The issuing date must be within the last 3 months
- Documents must be issued in Latin alphabet
- Documents must be issued by a government authority, utility company, or financial institution
- The address must be a residential address. Post Office boxes, hotels, and business addresses are not accepted
- The document must not be handwritten. If you're providing a rental/lease agreement, it can be accepted if the 'Template' is printed and only details and signature are handwritten
- You can find a list of accepted proof of address documents in this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/verifying-identity/accepted-proof-of-address-documents

## Your details
- The name on the document must match the name on your Revolut account
- Your document must match the address linked to your Revolut account, otherwise you'll need to update your address first

## How to upload the document
Simply follow the email or in-app prompts to upload your proof of address document. Make sure your Revolut app is updated to the latest version.
Your document should be clear and readable. Blurry documents won't be accepted.
For steps on how to update your address in-app, go to this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/how-do-i-change-my-country-of-residence.

title: I'm unable to verify my identity
content_text:
## Where do I submit my proof of identity?
If we need you to provide proof of identity, you'll get an email, push notification, and a banner on your home screen. Simply tap any notification we send you about verifying your identity, then follow the steps provided to send your proof of identity.
If you don't see any prompts for this information in-app, check your emails for an update from us. We may already have everything we need.

## I don't have the required document
- All supported document types will be listed on the in-app submission screen
- If you've applied for a valid document but haven't received it yet, you may be able to request an extension by selecting the in-app banner requesting verification, and selecting the 'Request more time' option
- If this option isn't visible to you, contact our customer support team using the in-app chat. You may need to provide a confirmation letter

## My document has been rejected
To pass the verification, your identity document must meet the following criteria:
- It's a supported identity document type
- It isn't handwritten
- It isn't expired, damaged, or hard to read
- The personal information on the document matches the information in your Revolut account
If you have a duplicate account, visit this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/log-in-issues/i-think-i-have-a-duplicate-account for more information.

## My verification is pending
We’ll complete your identity verification as soon as possible. Once it's completed, we'll notify you via email and an in-app notification. The process usually takes up to 1 business day, but may take up to 7 business days in some cases. We appreciate your patience.
If you need help with updating your tax identification number, you can visit this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/profile-plan/profile-settings/update-personal-details/update-my-tax-information.

title: Where you can sign up for Revolut
content_text:
If you're 16 to 17 years old, you can only open a Revolut account in the United Kingdom.
If you're 18 or over, you can open a Revolut account if you live in any country or overseas territory listed below.

## Supported countries
- Australia
- Brazil
- European Economic Area (EEA) — see below for more details
- Japan
- New Zealand
- Singapore
- Switzerland
- United Kingdom
- United States
- Mexico (waiting list only until launch in 2026)

## The European Economic Area (EEA)
- Austria 
- Belgium

- Croatia

- Lithuania

- Malta
