title: What is Revolut ID?
content_text:
Revolut ID is your single identity for everything in Revolut. It brings all your Revolut accounts and connected applications together in one secure place, giving you a unified view and full control over your digital identity.

## What can I do in Revolut ID?
- Update your personal information
- Manage your sign-in methods, including passcodes and biometrics
- View all Revolut accounts linked to you
- Review third party apps connected to your Revolut ID
Revolut ID is your central hub for identity and security across the Revolut ecosystem.

title: Managing a Revolut – Kids & Teens account
content_text:
## Accessing a Kids & Teens account
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Scroll down and select ‘Kids & Teens account’
To correct your child's date of birth, you'll need to share their birth certificate with Revolut Support via the in-app chat.
Kids & Teens accounts are sub-accounts of your personal account and don't have individual bank account details. They hold one currency, matching the parent's base currency.

## Adding a co-parent
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Choose the Kids & Teens account you want to add a co-parent to if you have more than one Kids & Teens account linked
- Tap 'Settings'
- Select 'Co-parent'
- Wait for the co-parent to accept your invitation
You can assign 1 co-parent at a time, with up to 3 reassignments allowed per calendar year. The admin parent adds a co-parent, who can top up and monitor the Kids & Teens account, but only the admin parent can withdraw funds.
To transfer ownership, close the Kids & Teens account first, then the co-parent can create a new account and become the admin parent.

## Closing a Kids & Teens account
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select their ‘Kids & Teens account’
- Tap 'Settings'
- Select 'Close account'
Make sure there are no pending transactions on the Kids & Teens account to be able to close it.
Only the admin parent can close a Kids & Teens account.

title: Revolut – Kids & Teens cards
content_text:
## Order a Kids & Teens card
In the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap the card icon in top-right corner 
- Tap Add new
- Select 'Kids & Teens' at the top
- Choose an existing account or create a new one
- Follow the prompts to complete your order
If you ordered a card but haven't received it within the specified timeframe, contact our support team for further assistance. Virtual cards aren't available to Kids & Teens customers.

## Activate the Kids & Teens card
Your kid needs to make a chip and PIN transaction in a shop or at an ATM. This will automatically activate the card. If your kid has entered their PIN incorrectly 3 times — and has been locked out of their account — you can unblock their PIN/CVV from your Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select their account
- Tap their card and select 'Settings'
- Tap 'Unblock PIN/CVV'
If your kid can't remember their PIN, you can view it from the Kids & Teens account's settings in your own Revolut app.

## Spending abroad
Card payments abroad are available, even though Kids & Teens account holders can't hold foreign currency balances. We'll perform any necessary currency exchange during a transaction.
If plan limits are exceeded, charges for currency exchange and ATM withdrawals may apply.

## Limitations
We block merchant categories which generally aren't age-appropriate for kids, such as alcohol, cigarettes, and gambling. We rely on the merchant's registered business type — also known as an MCC code — not the actual details of what is being bought with a Kids & Teens card.
Our contactless limit may differ depending on your region. If your kid's transaction has been declined due to this limit, just make a chip and PIN payment to reset it. For more details, read our Revolut – Kids & Teens T&Cs.https://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true
A kid can hold only two physical cards at the same time. After reaching these card limits, there is a cooldown period. You must wait 30 days from the last card creation date before you can create a new one.

title: Revolut – Kids & Teens Earn
content_text:
## Setting and managing challenges
With Kids & Teens Earn, the parent or guardian can set challenges for their kid, such as household chores, and determine their earnings for completing the challenges. Your kid can also request challenges from their own Kids & Teens app, but your approval is required.
Challenges can be one-time or recurring events. You can set daily, weekly, or monthly repetitions in-app. You can edit or delete the challenges you’ve set up at any time.

## Create a challenge
In the main Revolut app: 
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select their ‘Kids & Teens account’
- Scroll down and tap 'Challenges'
- Tap the plus (+) icon in top-right corner
- Provide a description of the challenge and choose the frequency
- Tap 'Continue'

title: Revolut Kids & Teens Rewards
content_text:
## What are Kids & Teens Rewards?
With Kids & Teens Rewards, you can help your kid earn cashback rewards by paying for items from their favourite brands online.
To earn a cashback reward, they'll need to: 
- shop through the listed brands in the Kids & Teens app
- complete the purchase within 30 minutes
- pay with their Revolut Kids & Teens card

## When can my kid expect the cashback?
Cashback is usually instant, but may take up to an hour. Contact us if your kid doesn't receive it within an hour of a valid purchase.
Transactions may be ineligible or have the cashback reverted if they're refunded, or if the Kids & Teens card isn't used. Read our Kids & Teens T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/u18-rewards-terms/?geo-redirect=true for full details.

## Enable Rewards
Go to 'Rewards' in the Kids & Teens app (if available) on the home screen, and browse our selection of brands. Then, follow the instructions to choose a brand and make a purchase to get a cashback reward.
If your kid can't find Rewards on their home screen, check if they have the latest version of the app. Rewards isn't available for all countries and ages. If your kid still can't find them after updating their app, they may not be eligible.

## Disable Rewards
In the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select their ‘Kids & Teens account’
- Tap 'Settings'
- Disable the online transactions toggle
To turn off Rewards for your kid, you'll need to disable online purchases for their Revolut Kids & Teens card.

title: Revolut Kids & Teens Save
content_text:
## What is Kids & Teens Save?
Revolut Kids & Teens Save introduces children and teens to saving with Pockets, a feature allowing parents or guardians, and their child to create and customise savings compartments. Money can be added by either party. Funds from a closed Pocket will be returned to the child's main account balance.
Pockets can't be used for direct card payments. Revolut Kids & Teens doesn't accrue interest.

## Add money to your kid’s Pocket
To add money from the main Revolut app:
- Go to the 'Home' screen
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select their ‘Kids & Teens account’
- Scroll down and tap 'Pocket' and create or select a Pocket
- Select 'Fund' to enter the amount you’d like to add and tap 'Confirm'

## Withdraw money in the Kids & Teens app
- Go to 'Save'
- Tap 'Withdraw' and choose an amount
- Tap 'Withdraw' again to confirm
Alternatively, you can withdraw on your kid's behalf from the main Revolut app.

## Spare change round ups
When you enable spare change round ups, we round up their Revolut Kids & Teens card purchases to the nearest whole number, sending the difference to their chosen Pocket.
For instance, if they spend 3.80, we round it up to 4.00, sending 0.20 in their Pocket. If there are insufficient funds, no spare change is added. You can manage this feature anytime.

## Recurring transfers
Your kid can schedule recurring transfers (daily, weekly, or monthly) from their account balance to a Pocket, choosing an amount, start date, and frequency. If there are insufficient funds, the transfer won't proceed. Both you and your kid can manage recurring transfers anytime.

title: Revolut – Kids & Teens payments
content_text:
## How do Kids & Teens payments work?
Kids & Teens accounts are sub-accounts of your personal account and don't have account details. Your kid can send payments to other Revolut and Revolut – Kids & Teens customers with the same base currency. They can't send or receive regular bank transfers.

## Enable payments in your kid's Kids & Teens app
- Go to 'Payments' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'Discover payments' and select 'Add phone number'
- Have your kid enter their phone number and tap 'Continue'
- Tap 'Allow access to contact' for syncing

## To send payments in your kid's Kids & Teens app
- Go to 'Payments' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'New' to select a recipient or choose one from the suggested section
- Enter the amount and add a note and/or a GIF
- Tap 'Send'
Transactions to unfamiliar recipients require approval from both you and the recipient.

## Minimum age for payments
Kids & Teens payments are offered to kids 13 years old and older. We also require the kid's phone number to be added to Kids & Teens to use the feature.
Based on your country, this can be done directly by your kid, once they're at the required consent age or older. If they’re under the required consent age, we’ll ask for your consent first before your kid's phone number can be added to enable this feature.
Kids & Teens payments are subject to account limits, based on local T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true.

title: Add money to or withdraw from Revolut Kids & Teens account
content_text:
## Add money
To add money to a Kids & Teens account from the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select their ‘Kids & Teens account’
- Choose 'Add money', enter the amount, and tap 'Add money'
Kids & Teens account uses the same base currency as the parent’s account and doesn’t have its own bank details. Kids can only receive bank transfers from their parents. To fund the account, transfer money to your Revolut account first, then move it to your child’s account. Check limits in the T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true.

## Recurring allowance
You can schedule a weekly, automatic top-up for the Kids & Teens account, choosing both the amount and the day of the week, and edit or delete this allowance at any time.
To set up recurring payments to the Kids & Teens account from the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select their ‘Kids & Teens account’
- Scroll down and tap 'Allowance'

## Withdrawing money
To withdraw money from a Kids & Teens account use the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select their ‘Kids & Teens account’
- Tap 'Move'

title: Forgotten passcode for a Kids & Teens account
content_text:
## Resetting your kid’s passcode
If your kid has forgotten their passcode, they'll be able to reset it by scanning a code on your device, just like the first time they signed in.
Make sure your Revolut and Revolut <18 apps are updated to the latest version.

## Retrieving a passcode via the Revolut <18 app
- Select the 'Forgot your passcode?' button below the log-in details
- Tap 'Start camera'
- Scan the code from the main Revolut app
To find the QR code:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select your kid’s profile
- Tap 'More' or 'Settings'
- Select ‘App access for your kid’
- Let your child scan the code using their mobile phone

title: Graduation to the main app
content_text:
Your child can start the migration to a Revolut personal account, which is accessed using the main Revolut app, once they turn 16. Both you and your child will receive a notification once they become eligible for migration to the main app.
- The migration process must be initiated by your child through their Kids & Teens app. You'll need to make sure your child takes the two steps below for a smooth transition
- Step 1: the teen must have an up-to-date phone number linked to their Kids & Teens account, which will be used to initiate the migration
- Step 2: the Kids & Teens app must be installed on the teen's phone, as this is where they will receive the prompt to migrate their account

## Transferring money to the main app
Your child can transfer their existing balance and Pockets from the Kids & Teens account to the new one.
If you'd prefer for them not to transfer any existing money to their new account, you can withdraw it before their 16th birthday.

## Revolut Kids & Teens account and card
Until your child fully activates the new personal account and transfers the funds from their Kids & Teens account, their Kids & Teens card and account will work as normal. After the transfer, their Kids & Teens account and card will be closed.

## Kids & Teens account closure
If the switch isn't made by their 19th birthday, we'll close the Kids & Teens account and return any remaining money to your personal account.
You can read more about the Revolut Kids & Teens account closing process in this FAQ.

title: Kids & Teens Instant Access Savings
content_text:
## What is Instant Access Savings?
The Kids & Teens Instant Access Savings account is a financial product designed for minors, with a parent or guardian holding control. It's an interest-earning account that allows for the accumulation of savings over time.
The interest paid will depend on your planhttps://www.revolut.com/our-pricing-plans/?geo-redirect=true. Money can be added by the child themselves, or the parent/guardian. If a Kids & Teens Instant Access Savings account is closed, the funds will be returned to your main account balance.

## How to create an account
Only a parent or guardian can create a Kids & Teens Instant Access Savings sub-account for your kid. You can do so from your personal mobile app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
-  Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Choose 'Add new'
- Select 'Savings'
- Select 'Kids & Teens'
- Follow the prompts to set up your account

## How to add or withdraw money
You and your kid can both add and withdraw money to or from the Kids & Teens Instant Access Savings. Money will be deposited into the main account of the person who withdraws the funds. To add or withdraw money as a parent or guardian in the personal mobile app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Select 'Kids & Teens Instant Access Savings' under your kid's name
- Tap 'Add money' or 'Withdraw money'
To add or withdraw money as a kid in the Kids & Teens mobile app, go to 'Save' on the bottom menu and tap 'Add money' or 'Withdraw money'.

## Instant Access Savings limits
The account can hold a maximum balance of £3,500 at any given time. If these limits are reached, we'll let you know, and you won't be able to add more money until the balance falls below the limit.

## How we protect your kid's savings
Eligible deposits are protected up to a total of £120,000 (including your personal and Kids & Teens Instant Access Savings) through the Financial Services Compensation Scheme (FSCS) via ClearBank Limited.
Eligibility criteria apply. Check the FSCS website https://www.fscs.org.uk/making-a-claim/customer-info/banking-licences/for more information.

title: Open a Revolut – Kids & Teens account
content_text:
## Create an account for your kids or teens
In the main Revolut app: 
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Tap 'Add new'
- Select 'Kids'
- Enter your child’s details and follow the prompts
You’ll be able to create a second account by tapping 'Add new' and 'Kids'. Revolut – Kids & Teens T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true apply. Revolut – Kids & Teens accounts hold one currency, which is the parent's default currency.

## Can my child open an account on their own?
Children older than the required consent age can start the sign-up process themselves in the Revolut – Kids & Teens app, or Revolut — Teen finance on iOS. They'll still need your approval to activate their account and order a card.
If you don’t approve your child’s request within 60 days, the request and account will be deleted.

## Signing in
Your child will need to scan a QR code from your Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Select your child’s profile
- Tap 'More' or 'Settings'
- Select 'QR code'
- Let your child scan the code using their mobile phone

title: Revolut — Kids & Teens subscription bundles
content_text:
## What is a subscription bundle?
Subscription Bundle is a collection of curated, age-appropriate benefits available to eligible Kids & Teens customers as a part of their Kids & Teens account — at no extra cost. Here's what you need to know: 
- Once your kid is above the age of digital consent as per country regulations, they become eligible to access subscriptions and credits from selected brands like Uber for teens, Picsart, SleepCycle and more, at no extra cost
- Your kid can view all benefit details in their Kids & Teens app with clear instructions on how to access them
- You also have complete visibility on all the benefits available to your kid in your Revolut app

## Where can I see these benefits?
You can view all these subscriptions in your Revolut app:
- Go the your kid's account and scroll to 'Your benefits'
- Alternatively, you can also tap the 'More' icon from your kid's account and select 'Benefits'
- You can view all benefits on the 'Explore benefits' page and also send reminders to your kid through your app

## How can my kid use these benefits?
Your kid will get complete details on how to access each benefit when they tap it through the 'Benefits' widget on their app's home screen or from their profile. They can simply follow the listed steps to get redirected to the partner app/website and redeem the benefit.
They can also refer to our Kids & Teens FAQshttps://help.revolut.com/help/profile-and-plan/revolut-junior/ in our Help Centre for detailed information on usage of each benefit.
If your kid faces any challenges in redeeming the benefits (e.g. promo code not working), you can contact us via the in-app chat for support. 

## What happens when the benefits expire?
When your kid turns 18, the benefits will automatically expire and any ongoing subscriptions will be deactivated. To continue using them, they may register independently via the partner's website/app. As long as they use the same account details to register, their progress won't be lost.

title: Request a Revolut – Kids & Teens virtual card
content_text:
In the main Revolut app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap the card icon in top-right corner and select 'Add new'
- Select 'Kids & Teens' at the top
- Choose an existing account or create a new one
- Follow the prompts to complete your order by selecting the virtual card option

## Limitations
- A kid can request a virtual card if they are 13 or above
- A kid can only hold two virtual cards at the same time
- After reaching these card limits, you must wait 30 days before you can create a new one
- Our contactless limit may differ depending on your region
For more details, read our Revolut – Kids & Teens T&Cs.https://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true

title: Revolut – Kids & Teens card management
content_text:
## Control your child's spending with their Kids & Teens card
To make sure you have control over your kid's spending, you can set monthly spending limits, receive instant notifications for your child's transactions they make, and freeze the card or adjust security settings if needed. To set a monthly spending limit:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Under your balance, tap Accounts
- Choose your child's Kids & Teens account and scroll to your child's card
- Tap 'Settings'
- Select 'Spending limit'
Kids & Teens cards are intended solely for the cardholder named on the card. If you need to access funds from a Kids & Teens account, simply withdraw the money back into your own account.

## Lost or stolen Kids & Teens card
You can instantly freeze a Kids & Teens card from the main Revolut app. To do so:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu of your Revolut app
- Below your balance, tap Accounts
- Choose your child's Kids & Teens account
- Select their card
- Tap 'Freeze'
- Select 'Settings'
- Tap 'Replace card'
If you're worried that the card isn't secure or has been defrauded, freeze it and replace it with a new one. To report fraud in-app with our online chargeback form, select the transaction you believe to be fraudulent in-app, and then tap 'Get help'.

## Apple Pay or Google Pay
To link a Kids & Teens card, your child needs to be of the minimum age to use Apple Pay or Google Pay. To link the Revolut Kids & Teens card to Apple Pay or Google Pay, your child will need to:
- Log in to their Kids & Teens account
- Tap the cards icon in top-right corner 
- Select 'Controls' 
- Scroll down and add the card to Apple Pay or Google Pay (whichever applies)
If you freeze your child's Kids & Teens card, payments made through Apple Pay or Google Pay will be disabled. To find out if your device supports Apple Pay or Google Pay, check the Apple or Google website for more information.

## ATM withdrawals
With their Revolut card, your child can withdraw cash from ATMs that accept Visa or Mastercard. Be aware of possible fees from ATM operators. Withdrawals can't be made with Apple Pay or Google Pay. Your child will need to have their physical Revolut Kids & Teens card and PIN code to withdraw cash.
Fees apply if your child exceeds their currency conversion or withdrawal limits, and there is an extra fee for currency conversion outside of FX market hours (Friday 5pm to Sunday 6pm, Eastern Standard Time (EST)).
To block ATM withdrawals for your child, choose their 'Kids & Teens account' in-app, go to 'Settings', select 'Card controls', and disable the toggle for ATM withdrawals. For more information, visit the Revolut Kids & Teens T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true.

title: Revolut Kids & Teens Payment Links
content_text:
## About Kids & Teens Payment Links
Your kid can now receive money easily and safely if you activate Payment Links for them. You’ll be notified that they’re receiving money into their account, but money will automatically be accepted.

## Activate Revolut Kids & Teens Payment Links
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts' and select your child’s account
- Below your kid’s balance, tap ‘Settings’
- Enable Payment Links for your kid
- You can go back to <18 Settings and disable Payment Links at any time

## Send Payment Links from your kid's app (no specific amount)
- Go to their profile in the top-left corner 
- Tap ‘Get paid’
- They can copy the link or tap ‘Share link’ to send it

## Send Payment Links from your kid's app (specific amount)
- Below their balance, tap ‘Request’ and then the people selector
- Tap ‘Create payment link’ and then enter the amount and a note
- Click on ‘Share link’ and select the recipient
To find out more, read our Revolut Kids & Teens T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true.

title: Revolut - Kids & Teens Referrals
content_text:
## What are Kids & Teens Referrals?
With Kids & Teens Referrals, both your kid and their invited friend get rewards for creating a Revolut account. Your kid needs to be at least 13 years of age to use this feature.
Your kid can refer friends by following these steps in their Kids & Teens app:
- Tap your profile icon in top-left corner
- Select 'Invite a friend'
- Copy the code and share it with your friends

##  My kid can't see their invited friends
Your kid can't view invited friends in their Kids & Teens app until their friend has used the personal invite code after signing up. After adding the code, your kid can track their friends' progress toward the reward. The waiting time for a reward to be issued is up to 5 business days.
Your kid can see how much they can earn for each referral and track their friends' progress. To claim the reward, friends must use your kid invite code and complete specified actions within a set timeframe, outlined in the 'Invite friends' section of their Kids & Teens app.
Eligibility may vary by country and age, and there might be a referral limit. Promo codes can only be redeemed once. For more information, see Revolut – Kids & Teens Referrals T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/u18referrals/?geo-redirect=true.

title: Revolut - Kids & Teens statements
content_text:
## Downloading a Kids & Teens account statement
In the main Revolut app: 
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Below your balance, tap 'Accounts'
- Scroll down and select 'Kids & Teens account'
- Tap 'More (...)' and select 'Statement'
As you (the parent or guardian) are the legal owner of the Revolut Kids & Teens account, the statement will be in your name. The Revolut – Kids & Teens IBAN shown isn't assigned to your kid, but to your main account. Check our Revolut – Kids & Teens T&Cshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/revolut-under18/?geo-redirect=true for more information.

title: What if Revolut - Kids & Teens isn't available?
content_text:
## Revolut - Kids & Teens supported countries and regions
- Australia, Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Brazil, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France (French Guyana, Guadeloupe, La Réunion, Martinique, and Mayotte), Germany, Gibraltar, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Japan
- New Zealand, the Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Singapore, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Ukraine, United Kingdom, and the United States
If Revolut - Kids & Teens isn't available in your new country of residence, we'll need to close the Revolut - Kids & Teens account associated with your profile.

## Limited access countries
You can still access Revolut - Kids & Teens if your new country is listed below, but you'll no longer be able to create new profiles:
- Cayman Islands, French Polynesia, Guernsey, Isle of Man, Jersey, New Caledonia, Saint Martin, and Sint Maarten

title: Is my private information safe?
content_text:
We take the security and confidentiality of your personal information seriously. We use secure data centres with restricted access to store and process your data.
Data transmissions between our mobile apps, servers, and third parties are encrypted.
Hashing turns your personal information into numbers to anonymize and protect it. 

## For 18+ customers only
We also hash the personal data that we sometimes send to our advertising partners for marketing purposes. If you don't want us to send your hashed data to our partners, you can opt out in the Privacy sectionhttps://app.revolut.com/settings/security/privacyrevolut://app/privacy.

title: When to put gambling controls in place
content_text:
Setting limits is a great way to start putting controls on gambling, but if you're experiencing any of the signs below, we recommend reaching out for professional support.
If you'd like more information on setting limits on gambling transactions, get in touch with us via the in-app chathttps://app.revolut.com/helprevolut://app/chat.

## Signs you might need additional support:
- Gambling over budget or to get out of financial problems
- Difficulty keeping gambling within set limits
- Arguing with friends or family about gambling
- Constantly thinking about gambling
- Hiding or lying about gambling activity
- Borrowing money to pay for gambling
- Spending more and more money and time on gambling
- Postponing or neglecting personal or professional responsibilities because of gambling
- Anxiety, worry, guilt, or depression related to gambling or its impact
Gamcare is a professional organisation to help with gambling. You can talk to them over the phone via the National Gambling Helpline 0808 8020 133, or start a live chat with them on their websitehttps://www.gamcare.org.uk/.

title: How does the gambling block work?
content_text:
The gambling block is a feature of the Revolut app that, when enabled, will block card payments that are identified as gambling. This can include payments to bookmakers, online casinos, and sports betting apps. When you open a Revolut account, it is disabled by default. To enable it:
- Tap your profile icon (your profile pic or initials) in the top left corner
- Tap 'Security'
- Tap 'Payments'
- Turn 'Gambling block' on or off
- Tap 'Yes' to confirm
We'll do our best to identify and block these card payments, but Revolut isn't liable for any successful card payments. 

## Which transactions will be blocked? 
Card payments are transactions where you use your card details. Card payments that we suspect are for gambling purposes will be blocked. For example, if you enter your card details on an online gambling site or if you use your physical card at a betting shop, these transactions would be blocked.
However, the block doesn't affect other types of transactions, such as bank transfers or payments made through third-party apps.

## How does the gambling block identify gambling payments?
Companies use merchant category codes (MCC) to classify purchases, according to the type of service the merchant provides. The gambling block will prevent payments to ‌merchants using MCCs linked to gambling.
If companies use different MCCs to hide their gambling services, the block won't be able to prevent those transactions.

## Gambling block timeframes
Once enabled, the gambling block will be active and block card payments immediately. Once the block is in place, it can't be bypassed.
If you decide to disable it, it takes up to 48 hours for the block to be lifted.

title: A refund or chargeback was sent to my closed account
content_text:
If you receive a refund or chargeback after closing your Revolut account, you can send us an email at support@revolut.com with the below information.

## Information to include
- A bank statement dated within the last 3 months with the alternate bank details you'd like us to send money to. It can be a photo, PDF file, or a screenshot, and your full name, address, and account number need to be visible
- A confirmation (screenshot, email, etc.) from the merchant showing that the refund was applied. It should contain the merchant's name, amount, and the last 4 digits of your Revolut card
Once we've verified the documentation, we'll initiate the transfer process to your desired alternate account. It typically takes between 3-5 business days for the refund or chargeback funds to arrive after we've processed it from our end.

title: My account was restricted or closed
content_text:
## Restricted account
We may restrict your account for various reasons, such as an incomplete identity verification, unverified source of funds, or outdated tax information. For a full list of reasons, refer to our Personal Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/terms/?geo-redirect=true.
If we need additional information from you, you'll receive an email. We'll also let you know if there's a due date for submitting these details.

## Reinstatement steps for restricted account
If your account has been temporarily restricted, we recommend:
- Following the in-app prompts to provide any missing information
- Making sure any uploaded documents are clear, valid, and not expired
- Having recent transaction documents ready for potential verification
If your account was restricted and you were charged for a paid plan, reach out to Revolut Support via the in-app chat for assistance.

## Closed account
Failure to provide information may result in account closure. If we need to close your account, we'll inform you via e-mail at least 60 days in advance.
Review the Personal Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/terms/?geo-redirect=true to find out more about possible reasons your account may be closed.

title: Report a fraudulent transfer
content_text:
If you think you've sent money to a fraudster, act quickly by securing your account and reporting the transfer.

## Secure your account
- Stop all communication with the scammer
- Freeze your card in-app by tapping the card iconhttps://app.revolut.com/cards/overviewrevolut://app/cards in the top-right corner. Select the card you want to freeze and tap 'Freeze'. Alternatively, you can terminate it by going to 'Settings' and tapping 'Terminate card'
- Contact the financial institution where your account is held. If it's Revolut, you'll need to contact our customer support
- If you can, report the matter or provide details of the scammer to the police 

## Report the transfer
In the Revolut mobile app:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Select the transfer in question from your transactions listhttps://app.revolut.com/transactionsrevolut://app/transaction-list
- Choose 'Get help' and 'Report this transfer as fraud'
If you suspect you've made a fraudulent card payment, visit this FAQ/help/card-payments-withdrawals/paying-by-card-issues/i-don-t-recognise-a-card-payment/i-was-not-supposed-to-be-charged-by-a-specific-merchant for troubleshooting steps.

## Money sent from an external bank to a Revolut customer
Since the transfer has been sent from your external bank account to another person's Revolut account, we can't check their account or help you with the reversal.
Contact the bank that sent the money and request that they recall the transfer to try to recover the funds.
We can't take action from our end. However, if the sending bank reviews this case and reaches out to us regarding the case, our team will be able to assist them.

title: What does Revolut use my data for?
content_text:
The information we need in order to onboard you may include your name, phone number, email address, date of birth, identity documents, and card information. Among other things, we use your personal data to verify your identity, protect you against fraud, and provide you with Revolut services.
You can find out more information about this in Privacy Policyhttps://www.revolut.com/legal/privacy/?geo-redirect=true. To find out more about the personal data that we store about you in order to provide our services:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Documents & statements'
- Choose 'General' and 'Subject access request'

title: How long will Revolut hold my data?
content_text:
Different data may have different retention terms. We’re required to keep certain personal data for a minimum of 6 years under Know Your Customer (KYC) and anti-money laundering laws.
To make sure we comply with these requirements, we have detailed policies and procedures in place. We may keep your personal data for a longer time because of a possible or ongoing court claim, or for another legal reason.
This regulation applies to all banks. You can find more information on our data retention policy in section 14 of our Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/legal/privacy/?geo-redirect=true.

## Data we retain
To check what general information we have about you in the app:
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Documents and statements'
- Tap 'General'
- Choose 'Subject access request'

## How to request data deletion
You’ll need to contact dpo@revolut.com to request data deletion. Our specialists will let you know if your request can be processed.
You can read more about how we keep your data safe in this FAQ/help/profile-and-plan/security-and-personal-data/account-security/is-my-private-information-safe in our Help Centre.

title: Personal data required to create a Revolut account
content_text:
We ask for these details when you try to open an account. Once an account is opened, you can check your details through the ‘Profile’ section. Find the ‘Profile’ section by tapping your profile picture or initials in the top-left corner of the Revolut app. Here’s the details we need:
- Name
- Phone number
- Date of birth
- Email address
- Country of residence
- Home address
- Valid identity documents
- A 'selfie' photo, video and/or voice recording (where permitted by law)
- Purpose of your Revolut account
- Gender (only if we're required by law to ask for this)
- Place of birth (only if we're required by law to ask for this)
- Occupation (only if we're required by law to ask for this)
- Tax number and residency (only if we're required by law to ask for this)

## More information
We ask for these details to verify your identity, protect you against fraud, and be able to bring you our services securely. To access certain products, we may ask for more information or documentation. We'll always explain to you why we need this information when we ask you for it.
Data protection is our highest priority. Your personal details, and any documents or data you send us, are safely stored in accordance with our Customer Privacy Noticehttps://www.revolut.com/privacy-policy/. To find more information about your data subjects rights, go to Section 9 of the Privacy Notice.
If you have any questions about data protection, contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@revolut.com.

title: Hidden balance feature
content_text:
Revolut has a 'Hide balances' setting, which blurs your balance any time you shake or flip your phone. This helps you keep your accounts private when you want to view them in public, as you can control when and how long your balance is visible for.
You can shake or flip your phone to show your balance again. This setting is switched on by default, but you can turn it off from the settings in the Revolut app.

## How to turn the hidden balance feature on or off
- Tap your 'Profile icon' in the top-left corner
- Tap Privacyhttps://app.revolut.com/settings/security/privacyrevolut://app/privacy
- Toggle 'Hide balances with a flip gesture' on or off

title: Why haven't I received my Referrals reward?
content_text:
With Referrals, you can earn rewards for up to 5 invitees for each campaign. To qualify for a reward, your invitees must complete all the required steps within the deadline. If an invitee fails to complete the steps on time, they won't be eligible for a reward in the next campaign.

## Potential reasons you haven't received your reward
- Your invitee didn't complete all the required steps before the deadline
- Your invitee had a Revolut account before
- Your invitee didn't use your unique invite link to sign up for Revolut. If this happened, you won't see them on your invitee list in the 'Invites' section
- One or more required steps completed by your invitee didn't meet the requirements described in this FAQ/help/referrals/more-help-with-referrals/referrals-new/missed-steps/requirements-to-get-the-referral-reward
- Your invitee has completed all the required steps, but the card payments aren't yet completed. Learn more about the 'Make purchases' step in this FAQ/help/referrals/more-help-with-referrals/referrals-new/invitee-contacts-us/my-friend-made-3-purchases-but-i-still-didnt-get-the-reward-why

## See exact requirements for the active campaign
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Invite friends' to view the details of the relevant Referrals campaign
If you've just completed the required steps, allow a few days for us to process and pay the reward to the person who invited you. The reward for your referrer will be paid automatically within 3–5 business days once we determine that all requirements have been met.

title: Referral reward smaller than expected
content_text:
Our Referral campaigns include a random Rewards option, similar to a lottery, where you can receive one of five designated amounts for each successful referral. The higher the amount, the less likely it is to be awarded.
Check out the list of rewards and their corresponding odds in the T&Cs for this campaign by going to 'Home' → 'Profile'  in the top-left corner → 'Invite friends' → scroll down and click on 'T&Cs' at the bottom of the screen.
To claim your reward, simply scratch the card in-app after your friend completes all the steps.

title: How to complete all steps for Referrals reward
content_text:
For a Referrals reward to be granted, the invitee usually has to add money, order a physical card, and make a certain number of eligible payments. 

## Add money
In the Revolut mobile app, the invitee will need to:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'Add moneyhttps://app.revolut.com/accounts/topuprevolut://app/topup'
- Tap 'Change' to choose your preferred top-up method (must be card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or bank transfer for Referrals steps to be met)
- Complete this step before the deadline
Using internal transfers from other Revolut customers won't count towards a reward.

## Order a physical card
In the Revolut mobile app, the invitee will need to:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap the card icon in the top-right corner
- Tap 'Add new'
- Choose a physical card, and complete the order
If you order a customised card, the step will only be completed once we approve the customisation. Delivery fees may apply. Ordering a card associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut <18, Revolut Business, or Joint Accounts won't count towards a reward.

## Make payments
The invitee will need to complete a required number of purchases before the deadline. Purchases made with cards associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut <18, Revolut Business, or Joint Accounts won't count towards a reward.
Eligible completed payments can be made with a virtual or physical card, online or in-store, with Apple Pay or Google Pay, and before or after ordering a physical card. Additionally, ensure that the purchases are:
- Greater or equal to the minimum amount. The minimum amount of each of the required transactions will be different depending on the referrer's region
- Made before the deadline
- Valid purchases (currency exchange transactions, transfers, gambling, or gift cards aren't valid purchases)

title: How to complete 'Make purchases' step for Referrals reward
content_text:
## Requirements for purchases by the invitee
- Each purchase is greater or equal to the minimum amount. This amount is different depending on the referrer’s region
- All purchases are made before the deadline
- All purchases are valid (currency exchange transactions, transfers, gambling, or gift cards aren’t considered valid purchases)
- The number of card payments needed is stated in the 'Referrals' screen
- Once the card payments are completed, the reward will be issued within 3–5 days
If a step is labelled as incomplete in-app, the purchases your friend made probably didn’t fulfil some of the requirements above. They can still continue to make purchases. Once they make enough qualifying purchases, this step will be marked green in-app.

## Purchase without a physical card
The invitee can make card payments:
- With a virtual or physical card, online or in-store
- With Apple Pay or Google Pay
- Before or after ordering a physical card 
Purchases made with cards associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut <18, Revolut Business, or a Joint Account won’t count. 

## Check exact requirements for the active campaign
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Invite friends' to see details of the Referrals campaign relevant to you
In the 'Invite friends' section, you can also review the terms and conditions by tapping 'Terms and conditions' at the bottom of the page.

title: Why hasn't my referrer received their Referrals reward?
content_text:
## Referrer can't see you in their invitee list
You may not appear in your friend's 'Invitee list' if:
- You had a Revolut account before — if this is the case, you aren't considered a new customer and therefore you won't be eligible for this campaign
- You didn't use your referrer's unique invite link to sign up to Revolut — if this is the case, you won't be eligible for this campaign

## Referrer didn't get a reward
The referrer may not have received a reward if:
- You didn't use the invite link from your referrer to sign up
- You didn't complete all of the required steps correctly. Make sure that the steps you completed satisfy the criteria described in this article/help/referrals/more-help-with-referrals/referrals-new/invitee-contacts-us/how-to-complete-the-add-money-step
- You missed the deadline
If you have just completed the required steps, allow a few days for us to process and pay the reward to the person who invited you. The reward for your referrer will be paid automatically within 3–5 days once we process that all requirements have been met.

title: How to add money for the Referrals reward
content_text:
To add money as one of the steps in the Referrals campaign, the invitee should:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'Add moneyhttps://app.revolut.com/accounts/topuprevolut://app/topup'
- Tap 'Change' to choose their preferred top-up method and follow the instructions
For a Referrals reward to be triggered, invitees must top up by card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or bank transfer. To complete this step, your friend has to top up before the referral deadline. 

## Step marked as incomplete
If you're still seeing the 'Add money' step as incomplete when you check the 'Invites' section of your app, it's possible that your invitee:
- Hasn't added money to their account
- Has added money in a way that doesn't count towards referrals — for example, using transfers from other Revolut customers

title: Order a physical card for Referrals reward
content_text:
An invitee needs to order a physical card in order for a Referrals reward to be triggered. The order must be made before the referral deadline, even if the card arrives after. If the invitee orders a customised card, the step will only be completed once we approve the customisation.

## How to order a card
To order a physical card in-app, the invitee should:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap the card icon in the top-right corner
- Tap 'Add new'
- Choose a physical card and complete the order
Delivery fees may apply. Ordering a card associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut Kids & Teens, Revolut Business, or Joint Accounts won't count towards a reward.

## Making a purchase without a physical card
The invitee can make card payments:
- With a virtual or a physical card, online or in-store
- With Apple Pay or Google Pay
- Before or after ordering a physical card
Purchases made with cards associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut Kids & Teens, Revolut Business, or Joint Accounts won't count towards a reward.

title: Referrals reward requirements
content_text:
To get a Referrals reward, the friend you invite to Revolut has to complete a few steps before the relevant deadline. When your invitee completes a step, it'll be marked in green in-app.
Only the person inviting friends will be eligible for the reward, unless you've received a communication directly from Revolut about being eligible for additional rewards.

## Steps your invitee needs to complete 
Once the invitee completes the steps required, all steps will be visible as completed in the 'Invite friends' section — except for card payments, which will only show as completed (green) once they've been fully processed.
- Your invitee must sign up to Revolut using your unique referral link and verify their identity
- They'll need to add money to their Revolut account by card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or bank transfer. Transfers from another Revolut account won't count
- Your invitee will need to order a physical card. Cards associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut Kids & Teens, Revolut Business, or a Joint account won't count
- The invitee must make a minimum number of eligible purchases with their Revolut card

## A few things to remember:
- Currency exchange transactions, transfers, gambling, and gift cards aren't considered valid purchases
- The purchase amount needs to be greater or equal to a minimum amount visible on the 'Referrals' screen. This amount differs depending on the referrer's region
- Some referral campaigns may require your friend to make a different number of card payments, and/or they might need to be made on separate days before the campaign ends
- Kids & Teens customers are not eligible for our referral campaigns

## Check the exact requirements for the campaign
- Tap the profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Invite friends' to see details of the Referrals campaign relevant to you
You can also review the terms and conditions by tapping 'Terms & Conditions' at the bottom of the page.

title: Conditions for the referral campaign
content_text:
Eligible customers can get a reward for inviting their friends to Revolut if their invitees complete the required steps before the deadline. You can get rewarded for a maximum of 5 successful referrals within each campaign period.
Only the person inviting friends is eligible for the reward, unless we've sent you info about other rewards.

## What invitees need to do
- Open an account using your unique referral campaign invite link. It must be their first time signing up for a Revolut account
- Verify their identity in-app. Kids & Teens account sign-ups aren't eligible for referral campaigns
- Add money to their Revolut account by card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or bank transfer. Money added to their account by transfers from other Revolut customers won't count. For more information, visit this FAQ/help/referrals/more-help-with-referrals/referrals-new/invitee-contacts-us/how-to-complete-the-add-money-step
- Order a physical card before the referral deadline. Ordering a card associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut — Kids & Teens, Revolut Business, or a Joint account won't count. For more information, visit this FAQ/help/referrals/more-help-with-referrals/referrals-new/invitee-contacts-us/how-to-complete-the-add-money-step
- Make card payments

## Making card payments
Eligible card payments can be made with a virtual card or physical card. Eligible payments should be: 
- Made online or in-store using a physical or virtual card, or using Apple Pay or Google Pay
- Greater than or equal to the minimum amount visible to the referrer on their in-app Referrals page
Payments related to currency exchange service providers, payment processing websites, gambling, gift cards, or money transfers are not eligible.

## Different campaign types
Some referral campaigns may require the invitee to make a different number of card payments, or they might need to be made on separate days before the campaign ends.
To find out the exact requirements for the campaign, the referrer can check their app and follow these steps:
- Go to the home screen
- Tap the profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select Invite friends to see the specific requirements for your referral campaign

title: Completing the 'Make purchases' step
content_text:
In Referrals campaigns, each card payment must be successfully processed to count towards the completion of the campaign steps. Here's what you and your invitee need to know about managing pending card payments and making sure they contribute to your success in the campaign.

## What is a pending card payment?
A pending card payment happens when a transaction has been authorised but not yet fully processed. This is typical in card transactions and generally clears within a few business days. In rare cases, a transaction may remain pending for up to 30 days.

## Checking the estimated reversal date
To find out when a pending payment is expected to be processed, the invitee should:
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Under latest transactions, tap 'See allhttps://app.revolut.com/transactionsrevolut://app/transaction-list' to see your in-app transactions
- Tap the card payment
- In the 'Status' section, you'll see the reversal date

## Card payment requirements for Referrals campaigns
A card payment must:
- Not be reverted, cancelled, or failed
- Be initiated before the campaign deadline, though completion can happen after the deadline

## Receiving your reward
Once your card payments are fully processed and verified:
- Rewards are typically issued within 3 to 5 days
- Make sure all payments meet the campaign's specific criteria as outlined in the in-app 'Referrals' section
- If all payments meet the required criteria, and are simply pending, the reward will be issued automatically once the payments are completed, even if this happens after the campaign deadline. There's no need to contact us, as the reward will be processed automatically

## Why you might not have received your reward yet
- The payment was still pending after the campaign deadline
- The payment didn't meet the required criteria, such as the minimum transaction amount or eligible merchant category. To learn about other requirements for the card payment step, read this FAQ/help/referrals/more-help-with-referrals/referrals-new/invitee-contacts-us/my-friend-made-3-purchases-but-i-still-didnt-get-the-reward-why

title: Claiming special bonus offered by Revolut promotion
content_text:
To receive your bonus (e.g. cash reward, cashback, free subscription), make sure to activate the special offer and complete the required actions within the specified time limit. Make sure you check the offer’s T&C's in the email you received inviting you to take part.
The steps you’ll need to complete to get your reward can be found in those T&C's.

## Usual steps required to get a bonus
- Add money to your account
- Order a physical card
- Make a certain number of genuine card payments (transactions to payment service providers and money transfers don’t qualify for a reward)
- Upgrade to a paid plan

title: Missing reward from an influencer or brand signup
content_text:
To claim your reward (signup reward, free subscription, or cashback), please review the offer’s T&C's. These can be found on the sign-up page, in our policies documenthttps://www.revolut.com/legal/promotions-terms/?geo-redirect=true, or — in campaigns which are promoted by brands or influencers — within online content by those promoting the campaign.

## To get your reward, you may need to:
- Sign up using a unique link
- Pass identity verification
- Order a physical card
- Add money
- Make a certain number of genuine card payments
- Upgrade to a paid plan
For eligible payments, minimum payment values and specific merchants may be required. Payments to payment service providers or money transfers may not qualify for a reward unless explicitly specified.

## When is the bonus paid?
Bonuses are usually paid within several days, or after the promotion ends. Check that you used the correct unique promotion link to sign up with your phone number and ensure that you are a new customer. Existing customers aren't eligible for new customer promotions.

## Difficulty receiving the bonus
To get your bonus (e.g. cash reward, cashback, free subscription), you’ll need to activate the special offer and then complete the required steps within the specified time limit.
Check the offer’s T&C's in the email you received inviting you to take part, to ensure you're completing the correct actions to get your reward.

title: Promotional cashback
content_text:
Revolut runs several different promotions, which include promotional cashback campaigns.

## Eligibility
These campaigns are launched to selected new and existing retail customers on any plan (Standard, Plus, Premium, Metal, Ultra).
Customers that have been enrolled into the promotional cashback campaigns will receive an email or in-app message stating the percentage and outlining which transactions are eligible for cashback.
Other details such as the cashback cap, limit, and campaign deadline will be outlined in the email as well. For more information, please check our T&Chttps://www.revolut.com/legal/incentives-2023-terms/?geo-redirect=true’s.

title: Is physical card activation necessary before the deadline?
content_text:
Just ordering the card before the deadline is enough. If the card was ordered in time but arrives after the deadline, the 'Order a card' step will still be completed.

## How to order a physical card 
- Go to 'Home' on the bottom menu
- Tap the card icon in the top-right corner
- Tap 'Add new'
- Choose a physical card and complete the order
Delivery fees may apply. Ordering a card associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut – Kids & Teens, Revolut Business, or a Joint account won’t count.

## Making a purchase
The invitee can make purchases:
- With a virtual or a physical card, online or in-store

- Before or after ordering a physical card
Purchases made with cards associated with Revolut – Kids & Teens Revolut Business, or a Joint account won’t count.

- Tap the profile icon in the top-left corner

title: Is a physical card required for your friend's purchases?
content_text:
If a step is labelled as incomplete in-app, the purchases your friend made probably didn't fulfil some of the requirements above.

title: How to complete 'Add Money' step

## Requirements for purchases by the invitee

title: What are the requirements for 3 purchases?
content_text:
## Requirements for purchases by the invitee
The invitee is the friend you've invited to join Revolut. Make sure that:
- Each purchase is greater or equal to the minimum amount shown on the 'Referrals' screen. This amount is different depending on region
- All purchases are made before the deadline
- All purchases are valid (currency exchange transactions, transfers, gambling, or gift cards aren't valid purchases)
- The number of card payments needed is stated in the 'Referrals' screen. Some campaigns may require your friend to make a different number of card payments, or they might need to be made on separate days during the campaign
- Once card payments are complete, your reward issues within 3 to 5 days

## Other useful information
If a step is labelled as incomplete in-app, the purchases your friend made probably didn't meet some of the requirements above. 
They can continue to make purchases, and should make sure they count towards the Referrals campaign. Once they make enough qualifying purchases, this step will be marked completed (green) in-app.

## Purchase without a physical card
The invitee can make card payments:
- with a virtual card, online or in-store
- with Apple Pay or Google Pay
- before or after ordering a physical card
Purchases made with cards associated with Revolut Pro, Revolut Kids & Teens, Revolut Business, or a Joint account won't count. 

## Check exact requirements for the active campaign

- Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner

title: What are the requirements to get a Referrals reward?
content_text:
A Referrals reward can only be granted if the friend you invited (invitee) has completed all of the required steps before the deadline. You can earn rewards for up to 5 invitees per campaign. When your invitee completes a step, it'll be marked completed (green) in-app.
Only the person inviting friends will be eligible for the reward, unless you've received a communication directly from Revolut about being eligible for additional rewards.
Once the invitee completes the steps they need to, all steps will be visible as completed in the 'Invite friends' section. This is except for card payments, which will only show as completed (green) once they are fully processed.

## Steps your invitee needs to complete
- Sign up: your invitee must sign up to Revolut as a new customer using the unique referral link you've sent them. Your invitee must not have had an account with us before. They'll need to verify their identity like all new customers. Kids & Teens customers are not eligible for our Referral campaigns
- Add money: your friend needs to add money to their account by card, Apple or Google Pay, or bank transfer. Transfers between Revolut accounts won't count
- Order a card: your invitee needs to order a physical card. Cards associated with Revolut Pro, Kids & Teens, Business, or Joint Account won't count
- Make purchases: the invitee must make a minimum number of legitimate purchases with their virtual or physical Revolut card online or in-store. Purchases with Apple Pay or Google Pay will work too

## Here's some extra criteria to consider:
- Currency exchange transactions, transfers, gambling, and gift cards aren't considered valid purchases
- Each purchase amount needs to be greater or equal to a minimum amount visible on the 'Referrals' screen. This amount is different depending on the referrer's region
- Some referral campaigns may require your friend to make a different number of card payments, and/or they might need to be made on separate days before the campaign ends

## To view terms and conditions
- Tap the profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Invite friends' to see the details of the Referrals campaign relevant to you
- Scroll down and tap 'Terms & Conditions'

title: Why did I receive a smaller reward for a Referral than you advertised in the app?
content_text:
Our referral campaigns include a random rewards option, similar to a lottery, where you can receive one of five designated amounts for each successful referral. The higher the amount, the less likely it is to be awarded.
To check out the list of rewards — and their corresponding odds — in the T&Cs for this campaign:
- Tap the profile icon in the top-left corner
- Select 'Invite friends'
- Scroll down and click on 'Terms & Conditions' at the bottom of the screen
To claim your reward, simply scratch the card in-app after your friend completes all the steps.

title: What is Airline Miles?
content_text:
## How does it work?
Airline Miles allows you to redeem your RevPoints and transfer them to air miles with select airline loyalty programs. Air miles are loyalty program rewards, which can be used for:
- Flight bookings
- Seat upgrades
- Lounge access
- Other travel perks
Usage may vary depending on the airline. For full details on your chosen airline’s loyalty program, and the benefits available, reach out to them or check their website.

## Airline loyalty programs we work with
We're always working to expand the list of airline partners we work with. Currently, we support redemption with the following loyalty programs:
- Flying Blue (supports KLM, Air France, Transavia directly, and multiple airlines indirectly)
- British Airways Executive Club
- Iberia Plus
- AerClub
- Vueling Club
- Qatar Privilege Club
- Finnair Plus
- Turkish Airlines Miles & Smiles
- TAP Miles&Go
To check the full list of eligible airlines, go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu of your Revolut app, and select 'Airline Miles'.

title: Linking your airline loyalty account
content_text:
## Link your airline loyalty account
In your Revolut app:
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu
- Tap ‘Airline Miles’
- Choose your airline 
- Enter your membership number and tap ‘Continue’

## Important notes:
- You must opt in to RevPoints to be able to use Airline Miles 
- The airline loyalty account must be in your name‌ — ‌third-party accounts like a partner or friend’s account can't be linked to your RevPoints
- Make sure that the name on your airline loyalty account exactly matches your Revolut account. Contact the airline if you need to edit your account details with them

title: Redeeming RevPoints with Airline Miles
content_text:
- RevPoints can be redeemed and converted into airline miles at a 1:1 ratio (e.g. 100 RevPoints = 100 miles in your chosen airline program)
- Redemptions are final and can't be reversed in any circumstances
- Customers can redeem a minimum of 1, and a maximum of 999,999 RevPoints per transaction

title: Difficulty using Airline Miles
content_text:
## Unable to link airline account
Account linking may fail for several reasons. The most common problem is that the name on your airline loyalty account doesn’t match the name linked to your Revolut account, or vice versa. If you update your details to match and the problem persists, contact our support team for further assistance.

## Miles not credited but RevPoints deducted
Miles may take up to 2 working days to reflect in your airline loyalty account, depending on the partner. If they still don’t appear after this period, please contact your airline loyalty program directly.

## Reversal of RevPoints used for Airline Miles
All Airline Miles redemptions are final and can't be reversed under any circumstances.

## Unlinking an account
Linked airline loyalty accounts can be unlinked by swiping left on the selected account. Go to ‘RevPoints’ on the bottom menu of the app and then to ‘Airline Miles’. When you see the linked accounts, swipe left to unlink or delete them. 
You can relink your airline account at any time.

title: Can I cancel an airport lounge pass?
content_text:
## Cancellation/refund of airport lounge passes
You can get a refund for any passes that haven't been redeemed by following these steps in the Revolut app:
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Select Lounges
- Tap 'Get help' and then Request a refund
- You'll automatically be refunded

title: How do I purchase an airport lounge pass?
content_text:
## Purchasing an airport lounge pass for myself or a guest 
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Tap Lounges
- Tap 'Get lounge entries', add any companions and complete purchase
Lounge passes are eligible for use at any of our supported lounges.

## Airport lounge access by plan
- Lounge passes are available to purchase in the app. A single lounge pass is valid for one visit for one person
- For customers on Premium and Metal plans, lounge passes can be purchased at a discounted price
- Ultra customers have unlimited free access to lounges

## Airport lounge passes for guests
- You can buy a lounge pass for your travel companions in-app
- Lounge passes are eligible for use at any of our supported lounges. However, guests must enter the lounge with you
- You can't send your pass to someone else. A pass is personal to a specific ID

title: How do I use my airport lounge pass?
content_text:
In the Revolut app:
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Select Lounges followed by 'Lounge passes'
- Present your QR code at the lounge check-in desk

## Using your airport lounge pass
- You need to present your QR code along with a valid ID at the check-in desk to access the lounge. You can't send your pass to someone else. A pass is personal to a specific ID
- Lounge passes don't expire. If you don't use it, you can save it for a future trip
- Each lounge has their own lounge terms

## Rules for using an airport lounge pass
- Search for an airport or look at nearby airports. Not all airports and lounges are available. View available lounges in the app before purchasing a pass
- You can't access more than one lounge within a 2-hour period
- The length of stay at a lounge is subject to the lounge terms. It's usually 2 to 3 hours
Lounge passes are provided in partnership with DragonPass. Use of and access to the lounge are subject to the Conditions of Use of our partners, the participating lounges, and our Airport Lounge Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/dragonpass-lounges/?geo-redirect=true.

title: I'm having difficulty with my airport lounge pass
content_text:
## Presenting your QR code at the airport lounge
- If the lounge has difficulty reading your QR code, give them your 'Membership number', which you'll find directly under the QR code on your pass
- If you're trying to purchase a lounge pass for a specific airport, but it doesn't appear in the list, that means it's not one of our supported lounges
- Individual lounges could also have their own terms, and can refuse entry in case of capacity constraints, repair work, and other valid reasons, even if you have a valid pass

title: How do I donate to Ukrainian refugees?
content_text:
Currently, customers in the countries mentioned below are able to donate money to Ukrainian relief efforts via our charity partner, The Red Cross. Your donation to The Red Cross will fund humanitarian and first aid for those affected by the conflict in Ukraine.
Donating is easy. You can choose to give a one-off donation, set up a recurring transfer, or round up spare change from your Revolut purchases. As always with Revolut charity donations, donations to The Red Cross are instant, free, and 100% of the money you donate goes to the charity.

## Donate to Ukraine via Red Cross
You can donate to Ukrainian relief efforts via The Red Cross in the following countries:
- Australia
- European Economic Area (EEA)
- Singapore
- Switzerland
- United Kingdom
We’re actively working on adding more countries.

title: Making a donation through Revolut
content_text:
## How to donate
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Select 'Donations'
- You'll see a list of available charities and can choose a charity to donate to
- To make a one-off donation, tap 'Donate'
- To donate regularly, you can choose 'Recurring donation' or 'Spare change'
Choose 'Spare change' to donate the rounded-up difference from your Revolut card transactions, or select 'Recurring donation' to set up a recurring donation in any amount.

## Charities you can donate to
To view a full list of charities, go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu and tap 'Donations'. To recommend a specific charity, scroll to the bottom and tap 'Suggest a charity'.

## Limitations
- Donations can't be cancelled or reverted
- Recurring donations will fail if there aren't enough funds in the account
To cancel recurring donations, go to 'Donations' and choose the charity you wish to cancel the recurring donation‌ for. Tap 'Recurring donation' and choose 'Delete'.
To cancel spare change donations, go to 'Donations' and choose the charity you wish to cancel the spare change donation. Tap 'Spare change' and then tap 'Deactivate' (or untoggle the toggle and tap 'Confirm' depending on your app version).

title: Spare change and recurring Donations
content_text:
## What are spare change Donations?
Spare change Donations allow customers to automatically round up the spare change from Revolut card transactions and donate the rounded up amount to a charity they have chosen from the ‘Donations’ section in-app.
Customers can also apply a spare change accelerator if they wish. This will multiply any spare change by two, three, four, or even up to 10 times the amount. For spare change Donations, this increases the donation amount.
- Rounding rules vary depending on the currency:
- PLN and RON: rounded to the nearest multiple of 5
- CZK, DKK, NOK, SEK, and ZAR: rounded to the nearest multiple of 10
- HUF and JPY: rounded to the nearest multiple of 100
- All other supported currencies: transactions are rounded to the nearest whole number

## What are recurring Donations?
Recurring Donations allow customers to select a start date, frequency of donation (daily, weekly, monthly etc.), and donation amount for any charity in the Donations platform.
The donation will be made as per the schedule set by the customer.

## View or cancel spare change and recurring Donations
To check if you have enabled spare change or recurring Donations, go to ‘RevPoints’ on the bottom menu and then to the Donations section. Then, tap ‘Contributions’. 
To cancel spare change or recurring Donations, tap the relevant one in the ‘Donations’ section and select ‘Cancel’.

title: Auto-renewing an eSIM data plan
content_text:
## What is auto-renewal?
When purchasing an eSIM data plan, you can choose to turn on auto-renewal. This means your data plan is automatically renewed if you run out of data. If you have auto-renewal turned on and you have some unused data left when your plan reaches its expiration date, your plan won't auto-renew.
Your plan can auto-renew for a maximum period of 90 days. After 90 days, we'll automatically disable auto-renewal. If you have notifications enabled on your device, you'll receive a notification when auto-renewal ends.
Your plan can auto-renew a maximum of 4 times. After the fourth renewal, we’ll automatically disable auto-renewal. If you have notifications enabled on your device, you'll receive a notification when auto-renewal ends.

## How to set up and stop auto-renewal
In the Revolut app:
- Go to ‘RevPoints’ on the bottom menu and go to 'eSIM'
- Get a new plan and turn on the ‘Auto-renew data plan’ switch on the checkout screen
- To turn off auto-renewal at any time, select one of your active plans and turn off the ‘Auto-renew data plan’ switch from the plan details screen

## Can my RevPoints be used for auto-renewal?
No. Even if you used RevPoints to purchase an eSIM data plan originally, payment for its subsequent renewals will always be debited from your local currency wallet.

## What happens when I run out of data?
If you have notifications enabled on your device, you will receive a notification when you have used 80% of your data. You will receive another notification when your data has run out completely and your plan auto-renews.
Your plan won't be renewed and auto-renewal will be disabled if you don't have enough balance in your local currency wallet to pay for the cost of the data plan.

title: Can I label my eSIM for my data plan?
content_text:
During the data plan eSIM installation process, you can label (name) your new eSIM. For example, you may label your new eSIM 'Travel' and your existing physical SIM 'Personal'. If you don’t rename your eSIM, it’ll normally default to the name 'Secondary'.
You'll use these labels when you choose which SIM or eSIM you want to use for data services.

## If you change your mind later, you can edit the labels
- Go to your device’s network settings
- Select 'Cellular' or 'Mobile Data'
- Tap the number whose label you want to change
- Tap 'Cellular Plan Label'
- Select a new label or enter a custom label

title: Difficulties with eSIM
content_text:
## Check if you have an active data plan
To check if you have an active eSIM plan, go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu. Tap 'eSIM' to view any active plans. Make sure to turn on data roaming for the eSIM you're using by going to the network/SIM settings in your phone.

## Make sure your eSIM is installed
You must have purchased a data plan first to be able to install your Revolut eSIM. Once you've purchased your data plan and your eSIM is ready to use, you'll be prompted to install it. eSIMs can only be installed and activated on the device they were purchased on.

## How to set up APN for Android users
- Open your device's settings and select 'Connections'
- Tap 'Mobile networks' and choose 'Access Point Names'
- Select 'eSIM'
- Check if the 'truphone.com' APN is set. If it isn't, go to 'Access Point Names' and select 'eSIM'
- Tap 'Add' and enter 'Revolut' in the 'Name' field
- In the 'APN' field, enter 'truphone.com' and save it
- Select the 'Revolut' APN for your eSIM

## Check your coverage
If you've completed the above steps and still can't access your data, you may be in an area with limited mobile coverage, or no coverage. Try changing locations and make sure you have enough signal to connect to your data network.
Switch your phone to 'Airplane mode' or turn it off and on again to restart the signal search.

title: Revolut data plans
content_text:
eSIM allows you to activate a mobile data plan in a specific country from a network provider without having to use a physical SIM card. You can buy a data plan anytime before or during your trip. Your plan activates as soon as you complete your purchase and install your eSIM.
Your eSIM data plan is provided by one of our partners, 1Global or Gigs. Revolut Ltd is an agent of 1Global and Gigs. When you purchase an eSIM data plan through the Revolut app, the fee for the eSIM data plan is payable to the partner.
The Revolut entity that you hold an account with will provide you with the underlying payment services. As a Revolut customer, you have rights and obligations under the Personal Termshttps://www.revolut.com/legal/terms/?geo-redirect=true and any account specific terms that apply to your Revolut payment account in relation to these payment services.

## Purchase data plans
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu
- Select eSIM and choose 'Get data plan'
- Select a coverage — local for one country, or regional or global for multiple countries
- Select data amount
- Continue to checkout
- Choose from your RevPoints, account balance, or both to pay for your plan and complete the purchase
The data plan’s validity period starts from the date of purchase, or when your eSIM is ready to be installed if it’s your first purchase. To request a refund, you need to contact us via our in-app chat. You can have up to 15 eSIM data plans, but only one can be used at a time.
Plans appear on the eSIM page in-app, with the most local one taking priority. New plans for the same area activate after the current plan expires. When a plan runs out of data, it moves to 'Expired plans', and the app switches to the next one automatically.

## Available countries
To see available countries regionally and globally in-app:
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu
- Tap eSIM
- Tap 'Get data plan'
- Select 'Global'
- Tap 'Global' again to see the full list of available countries

## Can I access network voice calls and SMS on eSIMs?
Your Revolut eSIM includes global data only. Voice calls and SMS messages are not supported, but you can use any messaging or call platform that uses data with your eSIM — for example, WhatsApp or Facebook Messenger.

title: Installing and activating my eSIM
content_text:
To install your Revolut eSIM, you’ll need to purchase a data plan first. This plan will decide how much data your eSIM comes loaded with. You can always add more data to your plan later, if you need it. eSIM is provided by Revolut Ltd.

## How to install your eSIM
In your Revolut app:
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu of the Revolut app
- Go to the 'eSIM' section
- Follow the steps below
Installing an eSIM on iOS: Tap 'Install' on the 'eSIM' section in your Revolut app.
Installing an eSIM on Android:
- Open settings and choose 'Networks & Internet'
- Select 'SIMs (+)' and then select a SIM
- Tap 'Next' on the 'Download your eSIM' page
- Tap 'Need help?' on the 'Scan your QR code from network page'
- Tap 'Enter it manually' on the 'Help adding a network page'
- Enter ‌the code you receive and select 'Continue', before tapping 'Download'
Depending on your phone manufacturer, the instructions for Android may differ.

## How to activate your data plan
- Install the Revolut eSIM on your device. A banner will appear in-app guiding you through how to do this
- Select the Revolut eSIM for data roaming from your device’s settings

## How to select a Revolut eSIM for data roaming
On iOS devices:
- Open 'Settings' and select 'Mobile Service'
- Under 'SIMs', select your newly installed eSIM (your device may automatically name your eSIM, but it won’t be your 'Primary' SIM)
- Toggle on 'Turn on this line' and then toggle on 'Data roaming' on the same page 
- Go back to the previous 'Mobile Service' page
- Tap on 'Mobile Data' and select the eSIM 
On Android devices:
- Open 'Settings' and choose 'Networks & Internet'
- Select 'SIMs' and tap 'Revolut' which is your downloaded eSIM
- Toggle 'Use SIM' on, then toggle 'Mobile data' on, then toggle 'Roaming' on
Depending on your phone manufacturer, the instructions for Android may differ.

title: Managing my eSIM data plan
content_text:
## Top up your data plan
In the Revolut app:
- Go to 'RevPoints' on the bottom menu
- Tap 'eSIM' and 'Get data plan'
